name: Max For Congress
subject: Statement of Support for Hung Cao in the 10th CD by Caleb Max
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-efOPrGkSVuBLVYxU2Z7WfNFDCL4aW-Nr_WrkiVo2tFmqUvAkkzi7xEaJoAWmma2wgGDitvDZT-WqvRXa7MNFSgJCcMb-f2otbpkKQXt_L2DkTh_2XAusqpDumz9_TvqnTuDDJmvBcvVANEwgtiAQkYG7-tQXQGq&c=23M8qBIttTUlafeZsf4IdXJMsqhlEsjHgX4jkM5PBr0_kvhMpOFQiA==&ch=9B1q2gFUQ-tjoGuFcHfHSmzHGxw7Vlv-eFlRg2qsUzho8Laoq2yXUQ==)

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
CONTACT: Ron Wright 703-663-0757
[media@calebmax.com](mailto:media@calebmax.com)
[www.calebmax.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-efOPrGkSVuBLVYxU2Z7WfNFDCL4aW-Nr_WrkiVo2tFmqUvAkkzi7_-auclnIJXefEynH1T1IjD2czRWaT_D0PeEA7vuDCwIV4yWRO3ueglm68BE7lkkkNj5AFLl-VE4zoa7CuR7FA8YvBQ-TgQH3w==&c=23M8qBIttTUlafeZsf4IdXJMsqhlEsjHgX4jkM5PBr0_kvhMpOFQiA==&ch=9B1q2gFUQ-tjoGuFcHfHSmzHGxw7Vlv-eFlRg2qsUzho8Laoq2yXUQ==)

---
|
---
| |
---
| STATEMENT OF SUPPORT FOR HUNG CAO BY CALEB MAX
---
| (Leesburg) - It has been the honor of a lifetime campaigning across the district and meeting thousands of amazing Virginians. The 10th district is my home. It is where I grew up, where I started my businesses and bought my farm. I love this area and the people in it. That is why I announced for Congress. I worry about where the Country is headed. Between the record inflation, skyrocketing debt, and erasing of our values, I know we are at a breaking point. I knew it was a long shot from the beginning, especially at my age. But the common thing I hear from folks is that they are worried about the next generation. The future for their children and grandchildren. From peers I hear things like "I could never raise a family in this environment" or "it is too late to right the ship." I reject these ideas. America's best days are ahead of us.
My generation lived through 9-11, two recessions, a nation at War in Iraq, Afghanistan and most recently a global pandemic. "Hard times create strong men. Strong men create good times. Good times create weak men, and weak men create hard times." We are in the hard times now and yet I know these times will create strong men and women. Men and women who grasp the American dream, bridge the division, and sacrifice for the greater good. Bobby Kennedy famously stated "each time a man stands up for an ideal or acts to improve the lot of others or strikes out against injustice. He sends forth a tiny ripple of hope and crossing each other from a million different centers of energy and daring, those ripples build a current that can sweep down the mightiest wall of oppression and resistance." We have those ripples of hope being cast across our country and I believe one here in the 10th district of Virginia as well.
That ripple of hope is Hung Cao. I have had the distinct honor of getting to know Hung on the campaign trail. I can vouch that he is a man of faith, principle, and family. As an American war hero and first generation American he will have the ability to relate to our diverse district full of minorities and veterans. As a Christian he has the character to bring together people of many faiths. As a homeschool father of five children, he can speak to parents' rights in their children's education. Hung often says if he was willing to die for our nation imagine what he will be willing to do for the area he raises his kids, works a job, and his friend's own businesses. Hung fought for our nation, and I will fight alongside him for our district. I set out in January with a goal of defeating Jennifer Wexton. That has not changed - I just play a different role.
I want to send out a heartfelt thank you to all my supporters. First my family - they have always been steadfast in all my interests throughout my life and this endeavor was no different. Second, to all my generous donors, volunteers and staff who sacrificed their time and treasure for our cause. My team went above and beyond. And of course, my grandparents Frank and Carolyn Wolf! To be able to follow in my grandfather's footsteps is a dream that I have always had. To be able to learn from someone who ran campaigns, led with integrity, and has an innate sixth sense for politics is amazing. My grandfather's encouraging calls and reminders of being a man of character have taught me lessons I will have for life. I wish the outcome had been different, but I know how proud they are regardless.
Finally, I want to mention what a pleasure it was to get to work with and become friends with all the other candidates. Every single one are patriots that I will forever have respect for and know have a place in the future of this party. Their families are also amazing, and it has been a joy to get to know them. I look forward to friendships with each of them in the future. I hope that as we shift to the general election that the candidates, their supporters, and the entire Republican Party will rally together behind Hung. We need unity to retire Jennifer Wexton this fall.
For Country, Community and Commonsense,
---

| |

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9acb4b2ae0fe/statement-of-support-for-hung-cao-in-the-10th-cd-by-caleb-max?e=1669180a05)

---
| |
# STATEMENT OF SUPPORT FOR HUNG CAO
BY CALEB MAX
(Leesburg) - It has been the honor of a lifetime campaigning across the district and meeting thousands of amazing Virginians. The 10th district is my home. It is where I grew up, where I started my businesses and bought my farm. I love this area and the people in it. That is why I announced for Congress. I worry about where the Country is headed. Between the record inflation, skyrocketing debt, and erasing of our values, I know we are at a breaking point. I knew it was a long shot from the beginning, especially at my age. But the common thing I hear from folks is that they are worried about the next generation. The future for their children and grandchildren. From peers I hear things like “I could never raise a family in this environment” or “it is too late to right the ship.” I reject these ideas. America’s best days are ahead of us.

My generation lived through 9-11, two recessions, a nation at War in Iraq, Afghanistan and most recently a global pandemic. “Hard times create strong men. Strong men create good times. Good times create weak men, and weak men create hard times.”We are in the hard times now and yet I know these times will create strong men and women. Men and women who grasp the American dream, bridge the division, and sacrifice for the greater good. Bobby Kennedy famously stated “each time a man stands up for an ideal or acts to improve the lot of others or strikes out against injustice. He sends forth a tiny ripple of hope and crossing each other from a million different centers of energy and daring, those ripples build a current that can sweep down the mightiest wall of oppression and resistance.” We have those ripples of hope being cast across our country and I believe one here in the 10th district of Virginia as well.

That ripple of hope is Hung Cao. I have had the distinct honor of getting to know Hung on the campaign trail. I can vouch that he is a man of faith, principle, and family. As an American war hero and first generation American he will have the ability to relate to our diverse district full of minorities and veterans. As a Christian he has the character to bring together people of many faiths. As a homeschool father of five children, he can speak to parents’ rights in their children’s education. Hung often says if he was willing to die for our nation imagine what he will be willing to do for the area he raises his kids, works a job, and his friend’s own businesses. Hung fought for our nation, and I will fight alongside him for our district. I set out in January with a goal of defeating Jennifer Wexton. That has not changed - I just play a different role.

I want to send out a heartfelt thank you to all my supporters. First my family - they have always been steadfast in all my interests throughout my life and this endeavor was no different. Second, to all my generous donors, volunteers and staff who sacrificed their time and treasure for our cause. My team went above and beyond. And of course, my grandparents Frank and Carolyn Wolf! To be able to follow in my grandfather’s footsteps is a dream that I have always had. To be able to learn from someone who ran campaigns, led with integrity, and has an innate sixth sense for politics is amazing. My grandfather’s encouraging calls and reminders of being a man of character have taught me lessons I will have for life. I wish the outcome had been different, but I know how proud they are regardless.

Finally, I want to mention what a pleasure it was to get to work with and become friends with all the other candidates. Every single one are patriots that I will forever have respect for and know have a place in the future of this party. Their families are also amazing, and it has been a joy to get to know them. I look forward to friendships with each of them in the future. I hope that as we shift to the general election that the candidates, their supporters, and the entire Republican Party will rally together behind Hung. We need unity to retire Jennifer Wexton this fall.

For Country, Community and Commonsense,
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: What Laura Ingraham said.
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436493:6BU-wfofN:m:1:3317145305:8206F9860D638F5AE1C44842BB045938:r) Dear Peter, Radical activist teachers brainwashed a 12-year-old girl to think she's a "boy" and hid it from her mother... So, we're dragging the teachers and school into court to make them pay for their disgusting actions and stop this from happening to other children. [**But to win this critical case I need your help today. That is why I 'm asking you to join me by donating to make sure these radical teachers can't brainwash any more children.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436493:6BU-wfofN:m:1:3317145305:8206F9860D638F5AE1C44842BB045938:r) In case you missed the details of our case when I announced it with Laura Ingraham on her great **Fox News** show **The Ingraham Angle** let me recap it for you. One day Jessica Konen, a mother of a young 12-year-old girl in middle school was called in and told by the school that her daughter was now a "boy." What she found out was that over the past several months teachers indoctrinated her sixth-grade daughter into believing she was transgender and bisexual. Her daughter didn't even know what those two words meant until these sick activist teachers infected her daughter with their twisted beliefs... The teachers recruited Jessica's daughter to join their "Equality Club" where she was told she may be transgender and bisexual. The teachers then helped her to create a totally new identity with new names, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom. They even created a "Gender Support Plan" for her and instructed the faculty to use her new male name and pronouns -- ALL without her mother's knowledge. And worse than that -- **these radical teachers told Jessica 's daughter NOT to tell her mom because she couldn't be "trusted**." The actions of these teachers and the school are sickening... They intentionally hid their radical indoctrination from Jessica -- even though the Supreme Court has consistently ruled that parents have the right to control their children's education. Left-wing activist teachers, administrators and schools are out-of-control... It's disgusting. It's awful. And we have to stop them. That's why I'm asking for your help today. [**Will you join me to make these Left-wing activist teachers and the school pay for their illegal actions?** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436493:6BU-wfofN:m:1:3317145305:8206F9860D638F5AE1C44842BB045938:r) You see, we are suing the school AND the teachers for their illegal actions... Because the only way we're going to stop these activist teachers and administrators is to drag them into court. The fact is that we have no idea how many other children this is happening to across the country -- Jessica's daughter is just one example. We know the California Department of Education and the teachers' associations train schools and teachers to keep secrets from parents... Who knows how many other young children are being poisoned? Left-wing radicals are using our classrooms to brainwash our children and grandchildren with their sick-and-twisted views. And we have an opportunity to stop it. This lawsuit puts every single activist teacher, administrator and school on notice -- if you mess with our children, **we will see you in court**! They should be teaching our children math, reading and history -- not pushing them to become transgender or bisexual. But, to stop this from happening -- we need to win this case... That's why I'm asking for your help immediately today. [_**Will you please step up and make a generous donation to help us drag these radical activists to court?** _](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436493:6BU-wfofN:m:1:3317145305:8206F9860D638F5AE1C44842BB045938:r) And please know here at the Center for American Liberty we don't just file lawsuits -- we **WIN****** them!! My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on **Newsmax** and **Fox News** with **Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson, Shannon Bream** and **Fox and Friends**. I've been on a lot talking about our numerous legal battles _and victories_ against the radical Left. We've already won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court. We're also taking the fight to big tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop activist teachers from corrupting and hurting our children and grandchildren is so important -- it's one we cannot afford to lose. [**That 's why, I'm asking if you can give today -- $35, $50, $100, $250 or more. I will use it to protect our children and grandchildren from the radical Left.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436493:6BU-wfofN:m:1:3317145305:8206F9860D638F5AE1C44842BB045938:r) So, the next time a radical teacher wants to poison another child with their sick beliefs they'll know that we're watching and are ready to drag them into court... That is the only way we're going to stop them -- they have to fear the consequences of their actions! With your help, we'll hold these teachers accountable for brainwashing and grooming their young students- and we'll put all radical leftist teachers on notice that they won't get away with their plot to indoctrinate our kids and erase our parental rights. Thank you in advance for your support. **God Bless,** **Harmeet K. Dhillon** **Founder & CEO,** **The Center for American Liberty** [**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436493:6BU-wfofN:m:1:3317145305:8206F9860D638F5AE1C44842BB045938:r) P.S. Radical activist teachers in California tricked a 12-year-old girl into believing she was transgender and bisexual. They helped her change into a "boy" with a new identity a new name and new pronouns -- **and told her to hide it from her mother.** Now we're dragging these activist teachers and the school into court to pay for their abuse of her young daughter, and I need your help to win. [That's why I'm asking you to give an emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100, $250 to stop these radical liberals from poisoning our children. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436493:6BU-wfofN:m:1:3317145305:8206F9860D638F5AE1C44842BB045938:r) We must win this case and put every single Left-wing teacher and school on notice -- if you infect our children with your radical values we will drag you into court too! [**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436493:6BU-wfofN:m:1:3317145305:8206F9860D638F5AE1C44842BB045938:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436493:6BU-wfofN:m:1:3317145305:8206F9860D638F5AE1C44842BB045938:r) [**Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436493:6BU-wfofN:m:1:3317145305:8206F9860D638F5AE1C44842BB045938:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436494:6BU-wfofN:m:1:3317145305:8206F9860D638F5AE1C44842BB045938:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 Click here to [unsubscribe.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

name: Secretary Pompeo
subject: I’d like to share a story from my time as Secretary of State. 👉
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60438354:JlvXwfozN:m:1:3299561967:76220BCE600A8D1C7EFC6D6E8B76B313:r)
---

I'd like to share a story with you from my time as President Trump's Secretary of State. I was serving as President Trump's top negotiator and was tasked with playing hardball with some of the world's most dangerous powers.

On this particular occasion, I was working tirelessly to bring home an American patriot and man of God home from captivity: Pastor Andrew Brunson. Pastor Brunson was wrongly detained by the Turkish government for simply practicing his faith.

I tried to cordially negotiate with Turkish officials for weeks, but they remained reluctant to release the Pastor. Finally, I told them bluntly: the clock has run out and there will be drastic consequences if you hold this innocent man a day longer.

After this exchange, the Turkish government caved and released Pastor Brunson from his unjust captivity. They knew that America First leadership was not to be trifled with and that with President Trump and I in power, Americans could not be unjustly detained without recourse.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60438354:JlvXwfozN:m:1:3299561967:76220BCE600A8D1C7EFC6D6E8B76B313:r)
---

Soon after Pastor Brunson's return home, I had the honor of meeting him and his wife who shared with me the great tribulations they had faced during the Pastor's time in detainment.

I asked the Pastor how he explained his tireless resolve in the face of brutal captivity and he answered simply with "faith." He shared a Bible verse from 2 Timothy that I carry with me to this day.

The verse reads: "Thou therefore, my son, be strong in the grace that is in Christ Jesus. And the things that thou hast heard of me among many witnesses, the same commit thou to faithful men, who shall be able to teach others also. Thou therefore endure hardness, as a good soldier of Jesus Christ."

Pastor Brunson's commitment to his faith in the face of shameful religious persecution was inspiring. I always try to keep faith the forefront of everything I do and to turn to Christ in the face of adversity.

But the Pastor's story is not one that solely inspires awe - it equally serves as a reminder that religious freedom must always be protected in the face of bigotry.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60438354:JlvXwfozN:m:1:3299561967:76220BCE600A8D1C7EFC6D6E8B76B313:r)
---

The story reminds us that Christians around the world are prevented from practicing their faith. _**But religious freedom is not only assault in far off lands, but right here at home as well.**_

_**Not long ago, we saw government mandates that closed churches and left abortion clinics and liquor stores open**_. We must be vigilant for what happened just a year ago could happen once more.

**_Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith?_**

_**[If so, I'm asking you to please contribute to help us kick the radical Left out of power and elect Christian conservatives who will always defend your right to worship!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60438354:JlvXwfozN:m:1:3299561967:76220BCE600A8D1C7EFC6D6E8B76B313:r "If so, I’m asking you to please contribute to help us kick the radical Left out of power and elect Chrisitan conservatives who will
always defend your right to worship!")**_

---
| | [I SUPPORT RELIGIOUS LIBERTY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60438354:JlvXwfozN:m:1:3299561967:76220BCE600A8D1C7EFC6D6E8B76B313:r)
---

I'm calling on you - and thousands like you - to join me in defending our right to live out our faith without fear of persecution or government restriction.

Shining our light and evangelizing are biblical requirements, not challenges to the so-called separation of church and state.

So, let us renew our commitment to putting God before the government and ourselves. For when we do, America and the whole world prospers.

Unapologetically American,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60438354:JlvXwfozN:m:1:3299561967:76220BCE600A8D1C7EFC6D6E8B76B313:r)
---

Mike Pompeo

But the Pastor's story is not one that solely inspires awe - it equally serves as a reminder that religious freedom must always be protected in the face of bigotry. | The story reminds us that Christians around the world are prevented from practicing their faith. But religious freedom is not only assault in far off lands, but right here at home as well. Not long ago, we saw government mandates that closed churches and left abortion clinics and liquor stores open. We must be vigilant for what happened just a year ago could happen once more. Do you share my concerns about unfair attacks on people of faith? "If so, I’m asking you to please contribute to help us kick the radical Left out of power and elect Chrisitan conservatives who will always defend your right to worship!" | | I'm calling on you - and thousands like you - to join me in defending our right to live out our faith without fear of persecution or government restriction. Shining our light and evangelizing are biblical requirements, not challenges to the so-called separation of church and state. So, let us renew our commitment to putting God before the government and ourselves. For when we do, America and the whole world prospers. Unapologetically American, | Mike Pompeo | | Help Champion American Values: Text CHAMPION to 29910 | | "PompeoEmailFooter" Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC! Add info@email.cavpac.com to your address book! | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. # Weekly Newsletter

|
---
May 22, 2022 | Issue IXX
---
| |
---
| | Statement from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt on the Tragic Shooting at Buffalo Supermarket
Saturday, May 14, 2022
---
The tragic shooting that occurred in a Buffalo supermarket Saturday afternoon is heartbreaking for our community and people all across the state and country. My wife and I are praying for the victims and their families.
I want to thank the Buffalo Police Department and Emergency Medical Services for quick action in detaining the suspect and aiding the injured.
New Yorkers stand together in condemning this despicable violence.
---
| [VIEW STATEMENT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DQaIRJSKguOJBQonL1fvL51YMM46K8T0Oq-wOr1w5M-0YekUJmsNjorf1slL19SYdLQB7xukGy7XnyEZ5sC_ZRK37jWHouIm4FFh0LxPfsV1Is_bbzZ3gwXptdO_DbzLJJi1Ufi1nqclzMYidHSQFvCyosO65_A8E_1MkaGoE9ZBDvfu0fqyz2BHVmg6chiiscI33UZzJtU0Jy1Z2eXbpOhdWbN1xiOijXo4XonAEM9dEP-wnbQ3fnFhInYNVLVZD3JdmaWDc8KhNb0uUc2jfg==&c=b_IvMThGfVDNKAnandLetumloFmkQr6MVC1GtobJ8oTrwMadx82reg==&ch=k4kF2j-ObyLUTWEUQfJ5XBn0aT8rzU9Flv62rMvyu00T3uyANL4USQ==)

| | NY Republican Leaders: Bring Back Capital Punishment for Buffalo Shooter
---
On Tuesday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and Assembly Republican Leader Will A. Barclay introduced legislation that would bring capital punishment back to New York State in the wake of this weekend's tragic mass shooting in Buffalo. The bill would reinstate capital punishment in cases of mass murder, fatal hate crimes, and acts of terrorism, among other acts of extreme violence.
"Some crimes are truly unforgivable. This past weekend in Buffalo, a crime of unforgivable magnitude occurred when a hate-filled terrorist took the lives of ten innocent people in cold blood. We are heartbroken. We are also outraged. Now it is clear that New York must send a message to those who would deliberately target our neighbors based on the color of their skin. We do not tolerate racism. We do not tolerate terrorism. We do not tolerate acts of extreme violence on innocent civilians. We must bring capital punishment back to our state today, and deliver the only justice that is appropriate in this case and to ensure acts such as these never happen again," said Senate Republican Leader Ortt.
---

| Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and Stakeholders: SAVE THE NEW YORK FARMING INDUSTRY
---
Government Officials and Stakeholders Call on Governor & NYSDOL to Reject the Reduction of Overtime Threshold for NY Farms
---
On Friday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt, Assemblymembers Mike Norris, Angelo Morinello, and industry stakeholders called on the Governor and NYS Department of Labor to reject the Farm Laborers Wage Board's recommendation to reduce the overtime threshold for farms from 60 hours per week to 40 hours per week.

| "Our family farms and farmworkers play an incredibly important role in our society. The farming industry is a unique system that works much differently than corporate 9-5 jobs. This burdensome mandate will cause farms to go under, cut worker's hours, and jeopardize the future of New York's agriculture industry -- adding to the exodus of people leaving our state. The Governor and NYS Department of Labor MUST reject this proposal for the future of our farms and economy. Bittner Singer Orchards is one of the many farms that fear the effects of lowering the overtime threshold. I've traveled across the district and heard the concerns of our farmers. I will continue to be their voice in Albany and advocate for the ones who know what's best for our farms: our farmers and farm workers," said Senate Republican Leader Ortt.

| Ortt Honors Local Hero with Hall of Fame Nomination

Earlier this week, New York State Senate Minority Leader Rob Ortt was able to recognize and honor his nominee for the 2022 New York State Veterans' Hall of Fame, Col. Bruce R. Sutherland. The family of Col. Sutherland, who was honored posthumously, received the award from Sen. Ortt's office at the first annual Col. Bruce R. Sutherland Memorial Golf Tournament held at Niagara Frontier Golf Club - a local favorite of Col. Sutherland. The tournament, which hosted over 140 golfers, was held in his memory and was also used as a fundraiser for two of his favorite organizations - the Historical Association of Lewiston and the VFW Scholarship Fund.

| Legislation Sponsored by Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Passes Senate
---
On Wednesday, legislation sponsored by Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt ([S8367](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DQaIRJSKguOJBQonL1fvL51YMM46K8T0Oq-wOr1w5M-0YekUJmsNjorf1slL19SY9aFMjR1iDnskLU7BpPb4NWF3gOlJ7v3mfMxDSktxP375Y-4LAbDvcE1MTjMkyCyCVmy9z_zvGgktUkrgbDY6WO5ESXjp0XMLHpfwQMvQa8ah6Q_QKZGpOBfIZRqqSqr3&c=b_IvMThGfVDNKAnandLetumloFmkQr6MVC1GtobJ8oTrwMadx82reg==&ch=k4kF2j-ObyLUTWEUQfJ5XBn0aT8rzU9Flv62rMvyu00T3uyANL4USQ==)) was passed by the New York State Senate authorizing Niagara county to waive certain fees by local law for veterans' organizations. The measure eliminates building permit review fees and park permit fees for veterans' organizations seeking to use such locations for veterans' outreach and community events.
---

Senator Rob Ortt and the New York State Senate Republicans have called for immediate action by the Governor & State Health Department to address the widespread baby formula shortage.
In the meantime, a few things that parents can do:

* Try to order directly from a manufacturer.

* Contact your pediatrician, who may have various solutions.

clean_body: Sunday, May 22nd Edition | | | | == | Weekly Newsletter | May 22, 2022 | Issue IXX | | | | Statement from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt on the Tragic Shooting at Buffalo Supermarket Saturday, May 14, 2022 The tragic shooting that occurred in a Buffalo supermarket Saturday afternoon is heartbreaking for our community and people all across the state and country. My wife and I are praying for the victims and their families. I want to thank the Buffalo Police Department and Emergency Medical Services for quick action in detaining the suspect and aiding the injured. New Yorkers stand together in condemning this despicable violence. | == | | | | NY Republican Leaders: Bring Back Capital Punishment for Buffalo Shooter On Tuesday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and Assembly Republican Leader Will A. Barclay introduced legislation that would bring capital punishment back to New York State in the wake of this weekend's tragic mass shooting in Buffalo. The bill would reinstate capital punishment in cases of mass murder, fatal hate crimes, and acts of terrorism, among other acts of extreme violence. "Some crimes are truly unforgivable. This past weekend in Buffalo, a crime of unforgivable magnitude occurred when a hate-filled terrorist took the lives of ten innocent people in cold blood. We are heartbroken. We are also outraged. Now it is clear that New York must send a message to those who would deliberately target our neighbors based on the color of their skin. We do not tolerate racism. We do not tolerate terrorism. We do not tolerate acts of extreme violence on innocent civilians. We must bring capital punishment back to our state today, and deliver the only justice that is appropriate in this case and to ensure acts such as these never happen again," said Senate Republican Leader Ortt. | == | Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and Stakeholders: SAVE THE NEW YORK FARMING INDUSTRY Government Officials and Stakeholders Call on Governor & NYSDOL to Reject the Reduction of Overtime Threshold for NY Farms On Friday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt, Assemblymembers Mike Norris, Angelo Morinello, and industry stakeholders called on the Governor and NYS Department of Labor to reject the Farm Laborers Wage Board's recommendation to reduce the overtime threshold for farms from 60 hours per week to 40 hours per week. | == | | | | | == | "Our family farms and farmworkers play an incredibly important role in our society. The farming industry is a unique system that works much differently than corporate 9-5 jobs. This burdensome mandate will cause farms to go under, cut worker's hours, and jeopardize the future of New York's agriculture industry -- adding to the exodus of people leaving our state. The Governor and NYS Department of Labor MUST reject this proposal for the future of our farms and economy. Bittner Singer Orchards is one of the many farms that fear the effects of lowering the overtime threshold. I've traveled across the district and heard the concerns of our farmers. I will continue to be their voice in Albany and advocate for the ones who know what's best for our farms: our farmers and farm workers," said Senate Republican Leader Ortt. | | | Ortt Honors Local Hero with Hall of Fame Nomination == Earlier this week, New York State Senate Minority Leader Rob Ortt was able to recognize and honor his nominee for the 2022 New York State Veterans' Hall of Fame, Col. Bruce R. Sutherland. The family of Col. Sutherland, who was honored posthumously, received the award from Sen. Ortt's office at the first annual Col. Bruce R. Sutherland Memorial Golf Tournament held at Niagara Frontier Golf Club - a local favorite of Col. Sutherland. The tournament, which hosted over 140 golfers, was held in his memory and was also used as a fundraiser for two of his favorite organizations - the Historical Association of Lewiston and the VFW Scholarship Fund. | == | Legislation Sponsored by Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Passes Senate On Wednesday, legislation sponsored by Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt (==) was passed by the New York State Senate authorizing Niagara county to waive certain fees by local law for veterans' organizations. The measure eliminates building permit review fees and park permit fees for veterans' organizations seeking to use such locations for veterans' outreach and community events. | == | | | == Senator Rob Ortt and the New York State Senate Republicans have called for immediate action by the Governor & State Health Department to address the widespread baby formula shortage. In the meantime, a few things that parents can do: Try to order directly from a manufacturer. Contact your pediatrician, who may have various solutions. Contact your ==. | == During difficult times of loss and heartbreak, the compassion and helping hands of our community provides hope and reassurance that no family is alone. name: ICYMI News
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcll4enhnud7oaib2njqd6bh3vi2o5m1cbe34u90_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrmcp3jmloj2t34c1o65d5lecq6edtkspi7acth61jj8odmmdgjcob7m3gm5cdn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6dj39p5jcorr4tj66hgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clj64p36cdhm0oh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zviq2ubt8h49uhqvtpfpr6vdlaf4avlsoo37btl0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c9i6cor3c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcchm6t8iuf8vjeori24tq5eb6a33j3d0upfbem0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c9i6cor3c1h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zce74p2rqe898bcmc431llgdobjds51fduerait0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c9i6cor3c1h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl2prpqk4098kd6cnk6qq7vludv5j9mnageq7fr8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5cph68pj3cdg649fg)

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: How concerned are you about rising gas prices in America?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9017%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=P6iJ7wHuSpRhhSIFxL7Kww&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22847%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rnpmn3a%2fOlaro9UKeXSujQ&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22848%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gjOfL6sBB722hbQ2kg1BBQ&sysid=1) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22849%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=evpWJPuAhWE3bO69nicZig&sysid=1)** Thank you so much for your time. clean_body: Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. So, I joined the military when I was 18 and went on to serve our country as a Navy SEAL in multiple combat tours. **Now, I 'm running for Congress in the most competitive House race on the map - an election that will decide who controls Washington. ** I'm not a politician - I don't have a rolodex of fat-cat donors. I'm like you - a concerned American who loves this nation and will always stand up for what is right. I've fought for my country before and I'm willing to do it again, but I can't without your help. Hello,
I’m Julie, the campaign manager for Admiral Mike Franken’s campaign here in Iowa against Chuck Grassley.
As you probably know, the early polls show we're in for a very close race this November. Grassley’s approval ratings are the lowest they’ve ever been. But Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are raising tens of millions of dollars to spend attacking Mike. If we’re going to finally send Grassley packing this November, it’s critical we be up on the air _now_ – before they start drowning us out in TV ads.
**It's so important that I authorized starting to run TV ads across Iowa a few weeks early, even though we didn’t _technically_ have all the money in our budget to do so just yet.**
We took this risk because we had to. Whether or not Democrats hold onto our Senate majority is going to be decided here in Iowa, and we won’t stand a chance if we don’t immediately start introducing Mike to more voters before the Super PAC lies start. **So I bit the bullet and made the bet that grassroots donors like you would come through and help us fill our $100,000 budget gap...**
We need to do everything we can to defeat Grassley and protect our Senate majority. That means taking a few risks.
**But if we're going to win and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to help us raise another $100,000 before midnight tomorrow, close our budget gap, and ensure our new TV ads against Grassley can keep running.**
[**Mike’s not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Instead he’s relying entirely on people like you during this critical moment: Please, will you rush a donation of $5 or more right now – or whatever you can afford – to keep our ads on the air, help Admiral Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45603323/346685032/-42398318?refcode=em20220522am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njk0NWZiOC1jNmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FZdlPnGT60b8mG7nvYd1s4ljIFGoBUhKF_G-C2EuNSY=)

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWr-WfQhJN

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only
take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our
nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives-but
supported by many well-meaning Americans-to change the way we
elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the
Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWr-WfQhJN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent
matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but
the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by
progressives-but supported by many well-meaning Americans-to
change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do
away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our
Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a
National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to
me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more
clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning
this issue-views we will make available to policymakers and
opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on
Presidential Selection by using the link below:

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey

For most of our nation's history, the
Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution,
was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to
preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have
joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional
bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution
has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to
provide young people with a proper grounding in American
civics-too many Americans simply don't understand the importance
of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has
expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide,
directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the
Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide
through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The
Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over 5.6 million households and
businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of
liberty;

Promoting constitutional education
through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of
America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across
America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education
through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which
launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools
nationwide.

Your answers to the National Survey on
Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most
effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the
importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this
critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent
topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection
and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a
few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure
link I've provided below:

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey

And after you take your survey, I hope you
will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a
tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing
truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its
extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept
ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form
of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is
essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the
National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for
your time and attention-and for your friendship and support of
liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1mnlb3b0u4cpi58njnb719fuj6or9gmukvc7coo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c9i6cpr3clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5m69gnecpnmcrm8pj1ekqjctpn6oqe8cpkeaq6cp32c1rm0sjl6kp66djm6ljjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33cljc5g7cor665obbd1nm2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrj2rdd2kpil4kbnuqva82u5jfq3t6r95or88sao_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c9i6cpr3clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2oadl3eg2c9qdavebq27ld96nqdmvkt003765fg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c9i6cpr3clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaggc9b8mvt7ah5t5bpf54irv768iajrg5hksku8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c9i6cpr3clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Mayra Flores
subject: I'm an America First Hispanic Republican and I'm running in a must-win special election in South Texas. 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This will be the VERY FIRST House seat we flip this cycle.
Peter, my name is Mayra Flores and I'm running in a must-win SPECIAL ELECTION in Texas. I'm hoping to be the **VERY FIRST** House seat we flip this cycle. [**In a moment, I 'm going to ask you to make a $10 donation to my campaign but I wanted to introduce myself first.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436611:6zgNHfoEN:m:1:3317145305:A7B9F3CB1723FE99D7226BCDFC9C516A:r)
If you don't know me, I will be the first Latina in Congress who was born in Mexico before immigrating to America (LEGALLY of course -- like everyone coming to our country should).
**I 'm proud to be an America First Hispanic Republican.**
I'm running in the 34th District in South Texas where I've seen -- with my own two eyes -- the FLOOD of 2,000,000+ illegal immigrants pouring into our country since Joe Biden took office. My opponents will do NOTHING to stop the open-border radicals on the Left. [**So let me be very blunt: we need to build The Wall right here and right now.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436612:6zgNHfoEN:m:1:3317145305:A7B9F3CB1723FE99D7226BCDFC9C516A:r)
I live right next to the border so I can say this with 100% certainty: our border is collapsing and my community is suffering the consequences. So is your community. _Every state is a border state when illegal immigration is this out of control._
That's why I'm running and that's why Republicans NEED to win this special election.
[**If you can spare it, I 'm kindly asking you for just $10 or more to help me win.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436611:6zgNHfoEN:m:1:3317145305:A7B9F3CB1723FE99D7226BCDFC9C516A:r)

****[HELP MAYRA FLORES NOW -> ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436612:6zgNHfoEN:m:1:3317145305:A7B9F3CB1723FE99D7226BCDFC9C516A:r)****
Republicans CAN and WILL flip the first district of the election year right here in South Texas, but only with your help.
To victory,
Mayra Flores
Proud America First Hispanic Republican

subject: All eyes on Pennsylvania

body:
Let’s not sugarcoat it: failing to stop Mastriano could mean the end of abortion rights in Pennsylvania, the end of mail-in balloting, and, most likely, Pennsylvania’s refusal to award electoral votes to the Democratic presidential candidate in 2024.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45604861/346690896/1240394794?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDRiNTVhOS1jZmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vz7qnSEP2jHSRZ3SbloGIByPfQ5rJH6pcCB2iHWnys8=&emci=f9da058a-59d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=b44b55a9-cfd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=25616296)
Peter — As a state senator, Doug Mastriano bused rioters to the Capitol insurrection, led the fight to try to overturn the 2020 election, and wasted millions of taxpayer dollars on a sham “audit” of the results.
If he did all that as a state senator, think of how destructive it would be to have him as our Governor.
Let’s not sugarcoat it: failing to stop Mastriano could mean the end of abortion rights in Pennsylvania, the end of mail-in balloting, and, most likely, Pennsylvania’s refusal to award electoral votes to the Democratic presidential candidate in 2024.
**[The worst part is: this race is a toss-up, and we still haven’t reached our emergency goal of 1,000 grassroots contributions to stop Mastriano. I don't have much time, friend, so I'll get straight to it:
**My potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R), launched his first TV ad to defeat me and turn Georgia red. With experts confirming that this race could decide Senate control, Walker and the GOP are spending millions to smear my record with baseless attacks.**
The good news is that we're launching TV ads of our own to fight back – but right now, we're falling short of what we need to keep them live. **Unless folks like you rush your critical support ahead of the fundraising deadline at midnight _tonight_ , our ad could go dark, and we could end up ceding the airwaves to Walker.**
I'm running this campaign the right way, without a dime from corporate PACs. But that means I'm fully relying on _you_ to power our campaign to victory – **and with recent polls showing me 1 point down, we have zero room for error. **

With experts confirming that this race could decide Senate control, Walker and the GOP are spending millions to smear my record with baseless attacks. The good news is that we're launching TV ads of our own to fight back – but right now, we're falling short of what we need to keep them live. Unless folks like you rush your critical support ahead of the fundraising deadline at midnight tonight , our ad could go dark, and we could end up ceding the airwaves to Walker. I'm running this campaign the right way, without a dime from corporate PACs. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: What Laura Ingraham said
body:
if you mess with our children, we will see you in court!

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61482%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1GovpmS2u9aa83A8hRXQrA&sysid=1)
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Radical activist teachers brainwashed a 12-year-old girl to think she's a "boy" and hid it from her mother...

So, we're dragging the teachers and school into court to make them pay for their disgusting actions and stop this from happening to other children.

[**But to win this critical case I need your help today. That is why I'm asking you to join me by donating to make sure these radical teachers can't brainwash any more children.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61483%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fpHIA%2boWdJ9iYTIizkdlFg&sysid=1)

In case you missed the details of our case when I announced it with Laura Ingraham on her great **Fox News** show **The Ingraham Angle** let me recap it for you.

One day Jessica Konen, a mother of a young 12-year-old girl in middle school was called in and told by the school that her daughter was now a "boy."

What she found out was that over the past several months teachers indoctrinated her sixth-grade daughter into believing she was transgender and bisexual.

Her daughter didn't even know what those two words meant until these sick activist teachers infected her daughter with their twisted beliefs...

The teachers recruited Jessica's daughter to join their "Equality Club" where she was told she may be transgender and bisexual.

The teachers then helped her to create a totally new identity with new names, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom.

They even created a "Gender Support Plan" for her and instructed the faculty to use her new male name and pronouns -- ALL without her mother's knowledge.

And worse than that -- **these radical teachers told Jessica's daughter NOT to tell her mom because she couldn't be "trusted."**

The actions of these teachers and the school are sickening...

They intentionally hid their radical indoctrination from Jessica -- even though the Supreme Court has consistently ruled that parents have the right to control their children's education.

Left-wing activist teachers, administrators and schools are out-of-control...

It's disgusting. It's awful. And we have to stop them.

That's why I'm asking for your help today.

[**Will you join me to make these Left-wing activist teachers and the school pay for their illegal actions?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61484%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fGDjHpXndnvvj5qsme%2bVmw&sysid=1)

You see, we are suing the school AND the teachers for their illegal actions...

Because the only way we're going to stop these activist teachers and administrators is to drag them into court.

The fact is that we have no idea how many other children this is happening to across the country -- Jessica's daughter is just one example.

We know the California Department of Education and the teachers' associations train schools and teachers to keep secrets from parents...

Who knows how many other young children are being poisoned?

Left-wing radicals are using our classrooms to brainwash our children and grandchildren with their sick-and-twisted views.

And we have an opportunity to stop it.

This lawsuit puts every single activist teacher, administrator and school on notice -- if you mess with our children, **we will see you in court!**

They should be teaching our children math, reading and history -- not pushing them to become transgender or bisexual.

But, to stop this from happening -- we need to win this case...

That's why I'm asking for your help immediately today.

[**Will you please step up and make a generous donation to help us drag these radical activists to court?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61495%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H1RxDWp5nlFzMNR8JHYjsQ&sysid=1)

And please know here at the Center for American Liberty we don't just file lawsuits -- we **WIN** them!!

My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on **Newsmax** and **Fox News** with **Laura Ingraham** , **Tucker Carlson** , **Shannon Bream** and **Fox and Friends.**

I've been on a lot talking about our numerous legal battles and victories against the radical Left.

We've already won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court.

We're also taking the fight to big tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives...

But this case to stop activist teachers from corrupting and hurting our children and grandchildren is so important -- it's one we cannot afford to lose.

[**That's why, I'm asking if you can give today -- $35, $50, $100, $250 or more. I will use it to protect our children and grandchildren from the radical Left.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61496%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=scMEDU9uW53W6ESjoI6KDA&sysid=1)

So, the next time a radical teacher wants to poison another child with their sick beliefs they'll know that we're watching and are ready to drag them into court...

That is the only way we're going to stop them \-- they have to fear the consequences of their actions!

With your help, we'll hold these teachers accountable for brainwashing and grooming their young students- and we'll put all radical leftist teachers on notice that they won't get away with their plot to indoctrinate our kids and erase our parental rights.

Thank you in advance for your support.

**God Bless,**

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61497%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ml2IhZgCmr6NF16n1dIjMw&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61498%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5DByvw4mvtGWUDBqke9abQ&sysid=1)

**Harmeet K. Dhillon**
Founder & CEO, The Center for American Liberty

P.S. Radical activist teachers in California tricked a 12-year-old girl into believing she was transgender and bisexual.

They helped her change into a "boy" with a new identity a new name and new pronouns **\-- and told her to hide it from her mother.**

Now we're dragging these activist teachers and the school into court to pay for their abuse of her young daughter, and I need your help to win.

[**That's why I'm asking you to give an emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100, $250 to stop these radical liberals from poisoning our children.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61499%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3sUxm0zWpdnnGDTBqXFemw&sysid=1)

We must win this case and put every single Left-wing teacher and school on notice -- if you infect our children with your radical values we will drag you into court too!

[ >> DONATE TODAY! << ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61490%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tzsJww1MDdaKYuaFdQqRKQ&sysid=1)

---

---
[**Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61492%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L2hOyyDgloQyq%2blxkaWYgA&sysid=1)

body:
The military justice system is relentless in its unethical and often illegal acts as they unfairly strip our Defenders' rights a
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z28lh0s1omh11u6bi5oo82eij755l1rsirll6jb0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c9h60o75cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65thkedq6adbgckoeadtgs1p72cbl6pge8d9lepgj1clke9rrbcr661rjcttleoo6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33cljc5jr5c366pibbd77m2qmash5u)

Fellow patriot, Our Warriors are fighting tooth and nail for their freedom, but the cards seem to be stacked against them. **The military justice system is relentless in its unethical and often illegal acts as they unfairly strip our Defenders' rights away from them. ** Fellow patriot, do you know what our Warriors face as they fight to clear their good names?
---

name: Val Demings
subject: I'm no stranger to adversity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I always keep my eye on the prize, but the truth is I know I can't win this race alone.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45608844/346707724/1948590133?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1790-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGI5MGFiMS1kNGQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2dKNo1WW_KAbFSoLcrtwTaaiu86e5yUyKM2MSAGkgY=)
That girl is me, friend.
I grew up the daughter of a maid and a janitor, living with my six siblings in a two-bedroom, A-frame home in Jacksonville. With a lot of hard work, I became the first in my family to graduate college – and then, I entered the police academy at a time when there were hardly any Black women working as officers.
People told me I didn't belong in the force, but I risked my life to protect my community, working the night shifts as a beat cop. Years later, I became the first woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police.
I'm no stranger to adversity, friend. That's why it doesn't faze me when people like the chair of the Republican National Committee attack me personally, or when the GOP launches desperate attack ads to defeat me.******I always keep my eye on the prize, but the truth is I know I can't win this race alone. So I need your help right now to make sure Floridians aren't swayed by these lies.**
[**The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to regain Senate control, so if you're with me – if you want to elect me as Florida's next senator and expand our majority in the Senate – please donate $5 or more, split between me and Jacky Rosen, before my midnight deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45608845/346707731/1948590133?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1790-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGI5MGFiMS1kNGQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2dKNo1WW_KAbFSoLcrtwTaaiu86e5yUyKM2MSAGkgY=)
Thank you so much for joining this grassroots movement. It means so much to me to have you by my side.

Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=jhy1Qf7bRm5KjJBGnD67LtGK7MBVopuiwsuWnW%2FXb%2FCKYNzk5L7CtMqDyBduflYQKvedryBGBNUjNJIH2EhA%2Bc%2FlwQoILTe1lGF2QW7TMUunXKpwMjQCis4EcHW6TAx1ku4iBXXODGsIhRBc7rVMMLsijgDRDrfhhxvuuTQee%2B%2FaGhjI8E7PAHra%2Fm25G9NTtOY7hKUBYWnkgUCVWHa%2B8vTI3BMgSWzCyWweYq3gBRY%2BBANB23fiZjjmE4iTbHzC1bq4M0kQn1hoK%2BGLvsIpmejbEgtnTvk5LprX%2FVqqUAtHKDR7CBw0HctBfftqq3jYPvz%2BzUi0KoaO6an9No8llTCBf3VYedvVKrmHGDtdX0DNklWk3IirUpmzQRFquU23v5%2Fr7TZ46sfUhXp9AHwecUIGq9kR79JnvmAE1Khmd6c%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Pence, Devos, and our opponent: an update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220521&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220521&amount=28]
Team,
We wanted to follow up with you on the email we sent a few days ago on our opponent’s fundraiser with Mike Pence.
To recap: the former VP was in Michigan on Tuesday to support the DeVos family’s petition drive in our state, which would give tax breaks to donors who fund school vouchers for private institutions. This petition has been heavily promoted by Betsy DeVos, Republican mega-donor and the longest-serving cabinet member in the Trump administration.
Vice President Pence also appeared at a fundraiser for our opponent – who has thrown his support behind the DeVos initiative, introduced similar legislation in the state senate, voted against every K-12 education funding bill during his time in the legislature, AND is heavily backed by the DeVos family. They gave him nearly $50,000 for his Congressional run in a single day – and that’s just the money we can see. It’s a significant portion of the money he’s raised so far, which has overall been relatively low – and has left him scrambling to host as many DeVos-backed events as he can.
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220521&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220521&amount=28]
You can bet that Pence’s endorsement will send a signal to groups across the country that this race is viable – and worth investing in. And you can bet that an influx of major contributions will start rolling in for our opponent’s campaign, in addition to whatever money was raised from this event itself.
Will you chip in $10, $15, or even $28 to help us counteract these massive donations? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220521&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220521&amount=28]
Team Slotkin
Team,
Interesting news: Mike Pence will be at a fundraiser TOMORROW for our opponent.
It’s big news on its own, but it’s also noteworthy to know why he’s coming. Hint: it involves the DeVos family .
Recently, the DeVos family launched a petition drive in Michigan to give tax breaks to donors who fund school vouchers used at private institutions. This would mean that our tax dollars could be redirected to private and for-profit charter schools. If they’re successful at getting 340,000 validated signatures, the proposal will go straight back to the legislature for a vote. Because of Michigan's petition process, the legislature can vote on the measure and the Governor has no ability to veto it .
Elissa’s opponent is a big supporter of this initiative, and as a state Senator, he'll be voting on this legislation if the petition drive is successful. He has even sponsored similar legislation in the past. Meanwhile, he’s no friend of education: he’s voted against *every* K-12 education funding bill during his time in the legislature — even though his own party has the majority! He’s an ideologue who would rather give zero money to our kids than compromise on a bipartisan bill.
It’s not a coincidence that Elissa’s opponent is also heavily funded by the DeVos family – they’ve been among his biggest donors since he was first elected in 2014. A few weeks ago, they hosted a swanky fundraiser for him in Washington D.C., and gave him nearly $50,000 in one day – and that’s just the money we can see.
So where does the former Vice President come into all this? He’s in town to host a number of events in support of that DeVos-backed petition — one of which is a fundraiser for our opponent.
To sum up: Elissa’s opponent likes to say he’s a maverick who bucks his party — but he’s simply loyal to whoever funds him . In this case, the DeVos family. And now he’s being rewarded again with cash and an event with the former VP.
We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: DeVos money won’t buy this election. Will you chip in today to show the DeVos family they’re in for a tough fight? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220521&amount=28]

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement 📩
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436626:6U0ihfoZN:m:1:3317145305:AA5F9153A6CA8D3A7CF41BFB8C773E52:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436627:6U0ihfoZN:m:1:3317145305:AA5F9153A6CA8D3A7CF41BFB8C773E52:r "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60436627:6U0ihfoZN:m:1:3317145305:AA5F9153A6CA8D3A7CF41BFB8C773E52:r "Please click here to donate now")**

Polls show Charlie can win this race and stop DeSantis’ anti-democratic ambitions, but we need your help to raise the resources to make it happen.
