name: =?utf-8?Q?Richard=20Painter?=
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RICHARD PAINTER FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, The First District is a special place, a region that includes the Mayo Clinic, several colleges and universities, and vast farmland dotted with small towns filled with warm, hard-working people. That is why I am proud to be running for Congress for Minnesota’s First District. **I am running to be a problem solver and consensus builder.** I believe the First District needs someone who fights for working people on basic kitchen table issues - fighting price fixing for food and gas, fixing roads and bridges, and improving access to health care, education and good-paying jobs. The First District needs a representative in Congress who will stand up for our farmers, making sure they are paid well for the crops they produce, while also working to provide disaster relief in the face of the growing threat of climate change, where violent storms and droughts risk wiping out entire crops. **_Congress needs to appropriate funds now for emergency relief of farmers in the event of future extreme weather conditions._** _**Americans need someone who will fight to preserve our freedom and democracy, by holding accountable adversaries at home and abroad who seek to undermine our country.**_ We also must make sure our elections are secure and accessible to all. _I hope you will join me in our fight to tackle the challenges that the people of the First District share with many other Americans, not the issues some politicians use to divide us._ We face urgent problems, and we can't solve them without working together. For years, I have been fighting to clean up politics and ensure our elected leaders represent the interest of their constituents. Too many politicians in Washington have forgotten who they were elected to represent. They work for their big donors - not for the people. This campaign won’t take any corporate money and that is why I need your help. Can you help me today, so that I can work to represent ordinary Americans in Congress?[ A contribution of $5, $25, $100, $250 or whatever you're comfortable with giving will bring us one step closer to victory.](https://gmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b5e28d948d577e19f5422e846&id=4a5e15ec1a&e=8914b14955) This campaign is not about me. It is about preserving and building our democracy. Join us today and let's bring real change to Congress. Thank you, Richard Painter
---
| |
---

name: Kara Hahn
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45625702/346762189/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzE2M2Q4Yy1mYmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O7YqEaPvE8jBU7KB4auRPQ6dscMYco6OvuwOk_5sqsE=)

Team,

Today, I am suspending my campaign for NY-01. This was not an easy decision, but I’m confident it’s the right one.

We launched this campaign nearly a year ago. I made the announcement across the street from my dad’s old firehouse and outside the inn where I had my first job cleaning rooms. I was proudly joined by neighbors, teachers, nurses, and many of the hardworking community members who have shown up for me my entire life.

Since then, I’ve had countless meaningful conversations with voters from all walks of life and all corners of this district (even given the many forms the district has taken!). We built a grassroots campaign of volunteers who were the backbone of our campaign. I’m incredibly grateful to every single person who invested your time, money, or trust in this campaign. **I cannot thank you enough for believing in me and what I hoped to accomplish in Washington.**

I got into this race with a deep love for my country and community and I’m leaving it even more inspired by the people of Suffolk County than ever before, inspired by our resilience, and the potential we possess to create a brighter future. I truly believe a future is possible where no one has to break the bank to get mental health therapy they need, or prescription medications their lives may depend upon. And I believe a future is possible where we are not forced to pass on to our children and grandchildren an Earth that is simultaneously flooded and on fire.

It is more vital than ever that we flip NY-1 and elect a member of Congress who will stand up for our values. However, given the new Congressional lines and the late primary, it has become clear that we cannot win this race in November if we are still fighting ourselves just 11 weeks before Election Day. We must unite to win in November. We simply cannot afford to continue to be divided. There's no margin for error. I will not be responsible for making it easier for a right-wing Republican to hold this seat, so in the interest of the issues and communities I care deeply about, I have made the difficult decision to suspend my campaign and unite behind Bridget Fleming.

I may no longer be on the ballot, but I will not be on the sidelines. Our democracy and most fundamental rights are all at stake. In order to combat the dark forces that threaten these values, unity is extremely important right now. In that spirit, I look forward to getting back on the trail and I hope you will join me in support of Democrats up and down the ballot.

Service has been a constant in my life, and you can be sure that I will continue to serve our community in the best ways I know possible. I’m looking forward to continuing my work in the Suffolk County Legislature and to making a positive impact for Long Islanders.

I’m incredibly proud of the campaign we ran and can’t thank you enough for being a part of it.

Talk soon,
Kara Hahn

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45625703/346762190/-228812766?ms=em21_footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzE2M2Q4Yy1mYmQ5LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O7YqEaPvE8jBU7KB4auRPQ6dscMYco6OvuwOk_5sqsE=&emci=68275045-e2d9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=93163d8c-fbd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=25369896) to receive fewer emails. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.karaforcongress.com/p/iqfxB-1Q_EGRU3KKKQ5tDw2?unsubscribedata=OD1qACIB%2BtFIXLUTBfP2%2BVV8%2B7hxm%2Fd8j%2BLQ1Gj9iAvHYx7be1rBlbsaV3eMtTkLDsLbMeEg4Y%2B2YdoDvKU%2ByFXCNmbtMvDSXe9hMEpWosE7z4A9EHscdQG8vx3YNvvmsLgT3EczEs3qLjov3o2QC14XnMqfzJXnaaWYjWNPouReEFYFIghenDQR1cjWOVYjL0Vq01ksMNVdN0D%2FI0IjzICkwwRDzsR0p1J9xRtIwqBK9yW4bUYv72Iwoodl%2Be3oIZZn3bXlxpToRXbs7PzCwmAKGB7sSmMKW4Fy2ZihpLn7cdDdzjb%2BUMIOrb2F5%2FiDqB5P4ac0XZ%2FFLeH0MRhHsKL8lqRD%2F3%2FBZYwYGfPeEguXgoCgH5iZc6frTWy9bNdfWUb2l94BDwjfHCpL4lJpvuH6RgxzgcRjBwjMnDyTH822IFsz32PT3734W30WQKV9).

I was proudly joined by neighbors, teachers, nurses, and many of the hardworking community members who have shown up for me my entire life. Since then, I’ve had countless meaningful conversations with voters from all walks of life and all corners of this district (even given the many forms the district has taken!). We built a grassroots campaign of volunteers who were the backbone of our campaign. I’m incredibly grateful to every single person who invested your time, money, or trust in this campaign. I cannot thank you enough for believing in me and what I hoped to accomplish in Washington. I got into this race with a deep love for my country and community and I’m leaving it even more inspired by the people of Suffolk County than ever before, inspired by our resilience, and the potential we possess to create a brighter future. I truly believe a future is possible where no one has to break the bank to get mental health therapy they need, or prescription medications their lives may depend upon. And I believe a future is possible where we are not forced to pass on to our children and grandchildren an Earth that is simultaneously flooded and on fire. It is more vital than ever that we flip NY-1 and elect a member of Congress who will stand up for our values. However, given the new Congressional lines and the late primary, it has become clear that we cannot win this race in November if we are still fighting ourselves just 11 weeks before Election Day. We must unite to win in November. We simply cannot afford to continue to be divided. There's no margin for error. I will not be responsible for making it easier for a right-wing Republican to hold this seat, so in the interest of the issues and communities I care deeply about, I have made the difficult decision to suspend my campaign and unite behind Bridget Fleming. I may no longer be on the ballot, but I will not be on the sidelines. Our democracy and most fundamental rights are all at stake. In order to combat the dark forces that threaten these values, unity is extremely important right now. In that spirit, I look forward to getting back on the trail and I hope you will join me in support of Democrats up and down the ballot. Service has been a constant in my life, and you can be sure that I will continue to serve our community in the best ways I know possible. I’m looking forward to continuing my work in the Suffolk County Legislature and to making a positive impact for Long Islanders. I’m incredibly proud of the campaign we ran and can’t thank you enough for being a part of it. Talk soon, Kara Hahn *

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: Sorry to be so blunt
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:

#

Can you please make your first $3 donation to our people-powered campaign today?

| Friends,

Though we came up short yesterday I would like to thank each and every one of you for your words of encouragement, volunteer hours, and support on the campaign trail.

>From the bottom of my heart - thank you. To receive so many votes from friends old and new is truly humbling.

Now is the time to get behind our nominee for congress, Hung Cao. It is critical that we defeat Jennifer Wexton and her extreme agenda this fall, and I will be proud to support Hung in doing just that.

I give Hung my full endorsement in the campaign ahead and wish him the best of luck!

If you want to learn more about Hung, [visit his website](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=3585c0be49&e=fc83fb200d). Thank you,

Jeanine

name: Nikki Fried
subject: The Democratic Black Caucus just endorsed my campaign❗
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
I have HUGE news, Peter:
Over the weekend, I attended the Democratic Black Caucus of Florida’s conference. There, I spoke with Black Democrats who have been leading the fight against racial injustice and inequality in our state.
I listened to their concerns and laid out my plan to stand with them and uplift Florida’s Black community.
And I’m so proud to announce that, at the end of the conference, they officially endorsed my campaign to be your next Governor and bring something new to Florida!
Click here to make a donation and join the Democratic Black Caucus in supporting my campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=522dbcf]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=522dbcf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=522dbcf]
Ron DeSantis has done everything in his power to silence and suppress the Black community in Florida. He’s implemented some of the worst voter suppression laws in recent history, banned the teaching of truthful history in our schools, and attacked our freedom to peacefully protest against injustice.
I’m running for Governor to undo the damage he’s done — to be a champion for the Black community in Florida and to fight back against injustice in all its forms.
I couldn’t be prouder to have the support of the Democratic Black Caucus in this fight, and I hope you’ll join them by making a donation and helping us keep up this momentum. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=522dbcf]
This is one of the most important endorsements we’ve gotten, Peter. I’m deeply honored that leading Black Democrats have put their faith in me to stand with them, represent their voices, and be a leader in the fight for racial justice in Florida.
With gratitude,
Nikki

6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Governor Roy Cooper
subject: I’m personally asking you to support Cheri’s campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Thank you for joining me in standing with Cheri Beasley today.
#

Hey team,
Cheri Beasley is the partner I need in Washington to secure our right to vote, protect our environment, and deliver for the people of our state.
Just like I said when I appointed her to be our state’s Chief Justice, Cheri Beasley is the right person at the right time. So I am personally asking you to help her start the general election strong:
[**Please make a $3 donation to Cheri Beasley’s campaign for U.S. Senate today. North Carolina is our best chance to flip a Senate seat blue this year, and I know she has what it takes to pull this off so long as we all have her back.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220522-1-ma&refcode2=929.357359.n81CH0&t=1&akid=929%2E357359%2En81CH0)**
National Republicans are already on the air attacking her with a shameful ad meant to mislead voters about her decades of service to our state. Far-right super PACs have pledged nearly $50 million to try to buy this seat for their extremist candidate Ted Budd.
But despite pumping millions into our state already, a poll just last week showed Cheri and Ted Budd in a dead heat. North Carolinians are not buying it from these Republican super PACs.
I know what it takes to win statewide in North Carolina, and we could not ask for a better candidate than Cheri to flip this seat. She’s overcome tough challenges before and won statewide twice already. So with our support, I know she can pull off a historic victory in November.
[**I’m with Cheri and I need you to be as well — especially right now as we kick off North Carolina’s general election. Please donate $3 to her campaign today to help us flip this Senate seat in November.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220522-1-ma&refcode2=929.357359.n81CH0&t=2&akid=929%2E357359%2En81CH0)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220522-1-ma&refcode2=929.357359.n81CH0&t=21&akid=929%2E357359%2En81CH0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em220522-1-ma&refcode2=929.357359.n81CH0&t=22&akid=929%2E357359%2En81CH0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $20.22](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=20.22&refcode=em220522-1-ma&refcode2=929.357359.n81CH0&t=23&akid=929%2E357359%2En81CH0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220522-1-ma&refcode2=929.357359.n81CH0&t=24&akid=929%2E357359%2En81CH0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220522-1-ma&refcode2=929.357359.n81CH0&t=25&akid=929%2E357359%2En81CH0)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220522-1-ma&refcode2=929.357359.n81CH0&t=26&akid=929%2E357359%2En81CH0)**
---
****
Cheri and I have both had races come down to a small number of votes. That’s just how these races go in North Carolina.
In a race as competitive as this one, a handful of votes on Election Day could make all the difference. That means every dollar we donate, every door we knock, and every voter we register will matter.
Thank you for joining me in standing with Cheri Beasley today,
Roy

subject: Stuck in the past
body:
While my opponent may be stagnant, here’s where I’m leading Texas | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=0b9ee33632&e=4712f71bea)

| [Give Today!](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=cdbfde4609&e=4712f71bea "Give Today!")
---
| While Ronny Jackson is stuck daydreaming about the past, I’m looking to the future.

I’m not constantly asking what you miss most about failed presidencies.
---
|
---
| **I’m asking what _you_ need** and what I can do to create strong, healthy communities.

**I’m focused on building a brighter future** where our kids excel in school, farmers reap gains, and the economy thrives. **But I can’t build it alone.**

**[That’s why I’m asking you to support my campaign with a $25, $50 or $100 contribution.](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=65deafe5fc&e=4712f71bea)**

Together, let’s keep Texas moving forward.

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45625994/346764152/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzgyYmU2Ni0wMWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=secYNLNRJ-BxxYi2--ofkODVeCBQkfZtgA1oJwtjH6Y=&emci=99138188-dad6-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=8782be66-01da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15353729)
---
Thank you, thank you, thank you.

My heart is full of gratitude. Because of you, because of the team that we built, and because of grassroots power across the great state of Oregon - we have won the Democratic Primary for Governor.

This would not have happened without you. I believe campaigns are a team effort. Your support has been amazing!

I’m energized by the fight ahead of us. There is so much at stake. The Supreme Court is preparing to overturn 50 years of precedent and restrict abortion access across this country. We are in the most critical decade to address climate change and protect our communities on the frontlines of its impact. We need to fight for working Oregonians, protecting them on the job and putting more money in their pockets to take care of their families. And we need to tackle our housing crisis head on, get our neighbors off the streets and build enough affordable housing to meet the needs of our communities.

I know we can meet these challenges successfully together.

[**The support of everyone on Team Tina is how we got here. And I need you again, now, to start building a winning campaign for November. clean_body: | Thank you, thank you, thank you. My heart is full of gratitude. Because of you, because of the team that we built, and because of grassroots power across the great state of Oregon - we have won the Democratic Primary for Governor. This would not have happened without you. I believe campaigns are a team effort. Your support has been amazing! I’m energized by the fight ahead of us. There is so much at stake. The Supreme Court is preparing to overturn 50 years of precedent and restrict abortion access across this country. We are in the most critical decade to address climate change and protect our communities on the frontlines of its impact. We need to fight for working Oregonians, protecting them on the job and putting more money in their pockets to take care of their families. And we need to tackle our housing crisis head on, get our neighbors off the streets and build enough affordable housing to meet the needs of our communities. I know we can meet these challenges successfully together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = As we head into the November election, please know this: There is only one candidate running for governor who will stand up and fight to protect all Oregonians and move our state forward. We’ve got a lot of work ahead of us. We have people to house, a planet to save, and a better future to build. I’m running for governor because I believe in Oregon, and I’m ready to fight to make sure our state lives up to its potential. = = Thank you! **🚨NY-18 | OPEN SEAT 🚨**
>From day one I have been committed to running to represent the NY-18 congressional district & serving as the voice for our Hudson Valley values in Washington.

With the final implementation of the fair redistricting map, I am eager to continue my campaign across Orange, Dutchess & Ulster Counties and I look forward to uniting all corners of our district & serving as our Member in the U.S. House of Representatives.

Prices of every item we buy in the Hudson Valley going through the roof—gas at historic highs, baby formula shelves bare at our supermarkets, a crime crisis impacting our NY families, an unsecured southern border driving the fentanyl crisis, & so many more troubling issues.

I will serve as the desperately needed check and balance to the Biden administration and failed Washington leadership.

name: Will Rollins
subject: Is Justice Samuel Alito’s draft opinion a warning for LGBTQ rights?
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45626448/346765713/-707005773?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTk4MWJkYS0wMWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HQK5syp0mdRr3g8uIuamNdezNzNvytkCRvXTSv1Sle0=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45626449/346765715/976319900?refcode=em-5.22.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTk4MWJkYS0wMWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HQK5syp0mdRr3g8uIuamNdezNzNvytkCRvXTSv1Sle0=)
Hi Peter,

Since the leak of the Supreme Court’s draft opinion overruling _Roe v. Wade_ , the fight for reproductive rights has never been more urgent. In this moment, we need to come together and fight back against the far-right’s attempts to ban abortion, and that’s a fight I’m committed to.

In addition to this threat to women’s rights, many can’t help but question: _“what is next?”_

The “right to privacy” from the ruling almost 50 years ago established the legal foundation that protects same-sex marriage. The worry striking through the LGBTQ community is that overturning Roe could mean a roll back for equality.

The language Justice Samuel Alito used in his draft opinion served as a warning of the implications for LGBTQ rights. He referenced _Obergefell v. Hodges_ , the 2015 ruling that guaranteed same-sex couples the right to marry; and _Lawrence v. Texas_ , the 2003 ruling that granted the right to engage in private consensual acts.

With reproductive rights and equality on tenuous legal footing, it's more important than ever to elect leaders who will protect our rights at the federal level. We cannot risk falling back into the shadows and be treated as second-class citizens. I’ve spent my entire career fighting to uphold the Constitution and I pledge to continue being an advocate for us all.

**[Here in CA-41, our work starts by unseating extremists like my opponent Ken Calvert who have undercut our freedoms from the beginning. Chip in $3 today to send him packing.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45626450/346765716/976319900?refcode=em-5.22.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTk4MWJkYS0wMWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HQK5syp0mdRr3g8uIuamNdezNzNvytkCRvXTSv1Sle0=)**

Thanks,

Will

clean_body: | = = Hi Peter, Since the leak of the Supreme Court’s draft opinion overruling Roe v. Wade , the fight for reproductive rights has never been more urgent. In this moment, we need to come together and fight back against the far-right’s attempts to ban abortion, and that’s a fight I’m committed to. In addition to this threat to women’s rights, many can’t help but question: “what is next?” The “right to privacy” from the ruling almost 50 years ago established the legal foundation that protects same-sex marriage. The worry striking through the LGBTQ community is that overturning Roe could mean a roll back for equality. The language Justice Samuel Alito used in his draft opinion served as a warning of the implications for LGBTQ rights. He referenced Obergefell v. Hodges , the 2015 ruling that guaranteed same-sex couples the right to marry; and Lawrence v. Texas , the 2003 ruling that granted the right to engage in private consensual acts. With reproductive rights and equality on tenuous legal footing, it's more important than ever to elect leaders who will protect our rights at the federal level. We cannot risk falling back into the shadows and be treated as second-class citizens. I’ve spent my entire career fighting to uphold the Constitution and I pledge to continue being an advocate for us all. = Thanks, Will | = | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. Consider supporting Will's campaign by = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Will Rollins for Congress 31500 Grape Street St 3-452 Lake Elsinore, CA 92531 United States

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Donald Trump's handpicked candidate is blanketing the airwaves with attacks against me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12161?t=6&akid=2563%2E878179%2EkllCuP) I don't have much time, friend, so I'll get straight to it:

**My potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R), launched his first TV ad to defeat me and turn Georgia red. With experts confirming that this race could decide Senate control, Walker and the GOP are spending millions to smear my record with baseless attacks.**

The good news is that we're launching TV ads of our own to fight back - but right now, we're falling short of what we need to keep them live. **Unless folks like you rush your critical support ahead of the fundraising deadline at midnight _tonight_ , our ad could go dark, and we could end up ceding the airwaves to Walker.**

I'm running this campaign the right way, without a dime from corporate PACs. But that means I'm fully relying on you to power our campaign to victory - and **with recent polls showing me 1 point down, we have zero room for error.** **Please, friend - I'm counting on your urgent help to reach millions of Georgia voters with our people-powered message: [Will you split $5 or more now - as much as you can spare before tonight's deadline - between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to help keep our ads on the air, win in Georgia, and defend the Senate?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12161?t=7&akid=2563%2E878179%2EkllCuP)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Raphael Warnock and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12162?t=8&akid=2563%2E878179%2EkllCuP)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12163?t=9&akid=2563%2E878179%2EkllCuP)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12166?t=12&akid=2563%2E878179%2EkllCuP)
Thank you for standing with me in this fight, friend. I can't win it without you.

- Rev. Raphael Warnock
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=2563%2E878179%2EkllCuP). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=2563%2E878179%2EkllCuP).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2563%2E878179%2EkllCuP) to request fewer emails. subject: my husband;
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEAN PATRICK MALONEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Derek, I know it’s usually my husband Sean asking you for money. But today, I told Sean I’d be the one to ask, and explain what this campaign means to us. [_**So, yes -- I’m about to ask you personally for $15 before midnight. Let me explain why. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45626535/346766439/91184225?refcode=20220522_em_fr_b1_rf_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGE3MWU4MC0wM2RhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePu5gb-xFmhjVwYNGouSCvh3R9weNEkvJIREZu_WYNQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45626536/346766440/91184225?refcode=20220522_em_fr_b1_rf_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGE3MWU4MC0wM2RhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePu5gb-xFmhjVwYNGouSCvh3R9weNEkvJIREZu_WYNQ=) Derek, Sean is balancing two of the most demanding jobs in politics. \-- He’s defending his own seat from vengeful Republicans who have publicly called for his defeat. [**\-- And he’s Chairman of House Democrats’ campaign arm -- leading the charge to protect EVERY House Democrat and make sure Kevin McCarthy NEVER takes the Speaker’s gavel.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45626537/346766441/91184225?refcode=20220522_em_fr_b1_rf_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGE3MWU4MC0wM2RhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePu5gb-xFmhjVwYNGouSCvh3R9weNEkvJIREZu_WYNQ=) [_**That means he needs to work overtime to make sure he hits every single fundraising goal -- because a single miss could be the difference between keeping our House Majority or seeing Kevin McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Matt Gaetz take control. That’s why I’m asking you: Will you chip in $15 before midnight to fund his fight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45626538/346766442/91184225?refcode=20220522_em_fr_b1_rf_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGE3MWU4MC0wM2RhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePu5gb-xFmhjVwYNGouSCvh3R9weNEkvJIREZu_WYNQ=) Balancing both of these jobs would be tough for anyone. But Derek, I’ve never met someone who fights like Sean. It’s not just about politics for him. It’s deeply personal. It’s about creating a bright future for our three children -- and for every American family. I couldn’t be prouder of him -- as a congressman, husband, and father. And I’ve watched in awe as our historic Majority has cut child poverty in half, passed historic infrastructure investments, and ensured every American has access to life-saving vaccines. But if Republicans flip the House red, they’ll erase everything Sean and our Democrats have fought so hard for. [_**We can’t let that happen, Derek. I’m asking you from the bottom of my heart: Can Sean count on your $15 before midnight to protect the incredible progress he’s made? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45626539/346766443/91184225?refcode=20220522_em_fr_b1_rf_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGE3MWU4MC0wM2RhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePu5gb-xFmhjVwYNGouSCvh3R9weNEkvJIREZu_WYNQ=) | | [**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45626540/346766444/91184225?refcode=20220522_em_fr_b1_rf_30_rs&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGE3MWU4MC0wM2RhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ePu5gb-xFmhjVwYNGouSCvh3R9weNEkvJIREZu_WYNQ=)

body:
I decided to run for federal office this year because I can see the impending threat of the Climate Crisis and I think we need leaders with the braver | | | [](http://links.kenrussellforfloridaemail.com/u/click?_t=cee06b13e3c1411baa566b417c320e45&_m=21970f2563204c588f76e92220d301ef&_e=JMrWujoR7cYbQ_0E0Um8U_6_CS9LEewgzXl-fjPpPM9m0Jz7Zu7Yhqj3o2PfFixpLz7lP9si5PmZR1mxT7RpnSYjntyU_NKpWZ71-iKEueOfHQtOOVNpaLXc0ZYQ_Z1dQmVBDC9hrEO8ptGikPMuzgUie6TDPJzgDPky0P3KYD3N8cA2TUMHtgAFCXpLWikWp-nv7LTWRzdPWiwj78MwlNWfMjeSwXzhvn6EtPGOjmUM05A55mgwz2aPZgjrdc0w2NUS-f-0rOHfqnFqUWtGlnw7PYuKO7wm2gH62SngmqxamMYS9CNpcXtX4ImxjAeCsTwvWzxgjMPwmeNDxcuWJJL4w_ZjvI4MSIpe2KD7UUkg_P2_rzHW75Ksoza83CCggcV66j2iKOyapPoppEFJJapL2AEmctyqLrs326vtdO7ZTHtPWPYOr9BD30m068GwUzEbmW1LDLSo70jQZlieVRFBgILGid0SZD9zRXenHupUbFi39WR9LmZ_1ugvdCh5) Friends, I decided to run for federal office this year because I can see the impending threat of the Climate Crisis and I think we need leaders with the bravery to act to protect our planet and the futures of our children and grandchildren. There are so many reasons to get involved in our democracy at the federal level, but the movement to save life on earth is what motivates me most. **The Climate Crisis is the greatest existential threat of our time, and we are running out of time to reverse its most damaging effects.** **[Help me win this race and fight for a habitable planet! → → Rush in $20 now!](http://links.kenrussellforfloridaemail.com/u/click?_t=cee06b13e3c1411baa566b417c320e45&_m=21970f2563204c588f76e92220d301ef&_e=_ebzrUVIJJpADY5GOjzMfqlBuCok-kepsFiulgDL8Sk7NqCoCEL_yGjZF9CVcBAOe0OUt1fBbHRwWjgxZig0Fn58AIGnSPxn-PAR_jzw2GZNez3X1naJRThjtXTFdntwXkL4VduQCXwwop4DGXmW9kTwTjvMaFXZsM1-ff3QRc6TREyT9KKKuw4OYEjTTsfQCO7Yz-2h-gj45hR316sr5jlzzz5MWpNWfcBE_1YRI85qFgXPijG5ZqUuccdohVXQqLweNPg2Rl6Q4hrjVjgI6Ay0PCxU__TkfPqaWXpX4xMCoHz5kpzTXgNqYUEwZJ3LwPjbZDP0gkV4Y3JlOD7Ij14_b8JsoHCMfOCQ00JXaE2yqA1wFK6IsN0FZYq7fnePCHMlKhaHDFml50DcqxK_S7eTblaYKwhAgCVngcA7h56kN4qYxHeG9nGl66gQOuvJkfbUE--ICBR8ESWTpA2466syqo1nab9lCPcxRJcrJSmlpULnwo6Y4wn23Y1KZV_8)** I have three children, and I worry every day about the planet we are leaving for them. In Miami, we are currently represented in Congress by Republican Maria Salazar, and she is no champion of environmental justice or stewardship. She even voted against the Build Back Better Bill that included funding to curve the effects of climate change. Florida deserves a congressperson who wants to protect our environment, preserve our waterways and ecosystems, and ensure Florida’s wildlife is able to survive and thrive. Please join me right now in the struggle for our future. **[Chip in whatever you can!](http://links.kenrussellforfloridaemail.com/u/click?_t=cee06b13e3c1411baa566b417c320e45&_m=21970f2563204c588f76e92220d301ef&_e=_ebzrUVIJJpADY5GOjzMfqlBuCok-kepsFiulgDL8Sk7NqCoCEL_yGjZF9CVcBAOe0OUt1fBbHRwWjgxZig0Fn58AIGnSPxn-PAR_jzw2GZNez3X1naJRThjtXTFdntwXkL4VduQCXwwop4DGXmW9kTwTjvMaFXZsM1-ff3QRc6TREyT9KKKuw4OYEjTTsfQCO7Yz-2h-gj45hR316sr5jlzzz5MWpNWfcBE_1YRI85qFgXPijG5ZqUuccdohVXQqLweNPg2Rl6Q4hrjVjgI6LgI_YmaU-V3fOQn7pGjwUuC9oLGKFyMzKszOFeAiZn_akhNR-qvZj95HNyC6O_t3UHrZ84PP4C5Wa3BBiQaXP94Q2gx6IK6t4C0Kmcu5ndaJNHR6G9gS7nBOXycVsOXo8FDyAGFvI-coMKvD6m3-1UmOUHuUU9B3cWIOacuzxsYBE93n42HyuN3ddkXNWv4RqAMZQBPk-7fCmtcRNff_GPLRvIDhNpa8qzum62NNPes)** clean_body: I decided to run for federal office this year because I can see the impending threat of the Climate Crisis and I think we need leaders with the braver | | | Friends, I decided to run for federal office this year because I can see the impending threat of the Climate Crisis and I think we need leaders with the bravery to act to protect our planet and the futures of our children and grandchildren. There are so many reasons to get involved in our democracy at the federal level, but the movement to save life on earth is what motivates me most. The Climate Crisis is the greatest existential threat of our time, and we are running out of time to reverse its most damaging effects. I have three children, and I worry every day about the planet we are leaving for them. In Miami, we are currently represented in Congress by Republican Maria Salazar, and she is no champion of environmental justice or stewardship. She even voted against the Build Back Better Bill that included funding to curve the effects of climate change. Florida deserves a congressperson who wants to protect our environment, preserve our waterways and ecosystems, and ensure Florida’s wildlife is able to survive and thrive. Please join me right now in the struggle for our future. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Thank you so much, Ken Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Congress in Florida's 27th District. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today. ** Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Louis DeJoy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| It’s almost like DeJoy, whose family business includes direct competitors with the Postal Service, is trying to ruin this institution from within.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=268%2E5257348%2EzSzCpL)
Derek, the simple reason you’re _still_ hearing about Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy continuing to run the Postal Service is because we haven’t had the votes to oust him.
The issue here was less the House or Senate, but on the USPS Board of Governors, where for months two seats were left unfilled as President Biden’s two nominees were stalled in the Senate’s glacial confirmation process.
Well, the Senate finally did something, and confirmed Biden’s two nominees to the Board of Governors, the only body with the authority to fire DeJoy. The vote wasn’t even controversial — we just had to wait six months for it to happen.
**I know I don’t need to remind you, but we’re talking about a Postmaster General who:**
* Left his post as deputy finance chair of the RNC to take the job
* Intentionally slowed the mail at the height of the 2020 election
* Was the subject of an FBI investigation into a campaign finance scheme
* Repeatedly violated conflicts of interest with USPS contracts and family businesses
* And just pledged to increase mail prices at “an uncomfortable rate”

It’s almost like DeJoy, whose family business includes direct competitors with the Postal Service, is trying to ruin this institution from within.
So the Senate’s confirmations haven’t come a moment too soon. It’s time to fire DeJoy. Right now. Enough is enough.
[**Add your name to my petition demanding the USPS Board of Governors fire Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy. They must appoint a new Postmaster General who will work with President Biden and our Democratic majorities in Congress to improve the Postal Service for years to come.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-20220522-usps?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220522_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=268%2E5257348%2EzSzCpL)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-20220522-usps?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220522_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=268%2E5257348%2EzSzCpL)
---
Unfortunately, this isn’t the last we’ll see of Louis DeJoy — but if we keep the pressure up, we can ensure we kick this Trump lackey out of the Postal Service for good.
Thanks, as always, for raising your voice.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Hypocrisy at its finest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

→ On Wednesday, Beto joined Texans who work as janitors and are organizing
alongside SEIU in the fight for a $15 minimum wage.

→ In response, Abbott’s campaign lashed out with this: "Beto O'Rourke
seems to want nothing more than to drive Texas' booming economy into a
ditch."

This is hypocrisy at its finest: Just a few weeks ago, Abbott
single-handedly ordered a blockade of commercial truck traffic coming into
the U.S. It caused massive supply chain problems, drove up inflation
across the country, crushed businesses, killed jobs, and cost Texas more
than $4.2 billion in economic losses.

Beto believes that everyone working full time shouldn’t have to work a
second or a third job to make ends meet. Texans working full-time should
be able to provide for themselves, take care of their kids, and contribute
back to their community.

As governor, Beto will fight for workers and raise the minimum wage after
it hasn’t budged a penny in more than 12 years. Greg Abbott only cares
about the corporate executives who write massive checks to his campaign.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220522-1?refcode=ema20220522-190462&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=190462_444211_d_WXHv&akid=190462%2E444211%2Ed_WXHv ]Will you make a $3 contribution right now to help Beto
defeat Greg Abbott in November? Every grassroots dollar will send the
powerful message that we can take on Greg Abbott’s corporate mega-donors
and fight for workers across Texas.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220522-1?refcode=ema20220522-190462&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=190462_444211_d_WXHv&akid=190462%2E444211%2Ed_WXHv ]Contribute $3

With your support, we can elect a governor who stands with workers and
supports a living wage.

In solidarity,

Team Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=190462%2E444211%2Ed_WXHv

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Admiral Franken
subject: attacks against my military service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45626885/346769845/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTdlMWFjNS0wOWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WgrWbYAbAfdUPAIjW8lS0OIfD7L-mTuCd9_4LO_1NWs=&emci=3ca47dcc-5ad9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=ee7e1ac5-09da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=6371843)

Hello,
When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful.
People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ **I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened.**
They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service.
**And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other.**
This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue.
**In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $100,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – every dollar you can afford before our critical fundraising deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45626892/346769855/-42398318?refcode=em20220522pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTdlMWFjNS0wOWRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WgrWbYAbAfdUPAIjW8lS0OIfD7L-mTuCd9_4LO_1NWs=)

subject: Please, I’m asking respectfully
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
| | | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=4c87736aed&e=8a657725d1)
---
| | Peter,

Election Day is in just a few weeks and early voting starts **_in just days_** in our critical race to defeat far-left agitator Katie Porter _who is now defending unlimited abortion as a solution to reducing food costs for families instead of holding Joe Biden accountable for massive inflation! _

**This is crunch time for our campaign, and we’re still more than $20,000 behind funding our [Get Out The Vote ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=3e11c14475&e=8a657725d1)operation. If we come up short now it will cripple our chances to flip this seat from blue to red.**

Our race has been named one of the most critical in the entire nation to take back the House for Republicans and send Nancy Pelosi into retirement. That’s why it’s absolutely critical that we have the resources needed to win.

But with a $20,000 deficit in our budget, our voter outreach efforts before election day will fall short by more than 8,000 voters. In what is expected to be one of the closest races in the entire country, that could make all the difference in who wins on election day.

That’s why I’m reaching out urgently and respectfully to ask for your support. Will you help us get the funding we need for our Get Out The Vote operation to ensure we have the resources to defeat Katie Porter?
---
| [DONATE NOW TO GET OUT THE VOTE](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=b554a6b5b9&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE NOW TO GET OUT THE VOTE")
---
| Your support at this critical moment will not be forgotten and will absolutely make a huge difference!

v/r,
Scott Baugh

name: John Fetterman
subject: I have a favor to ask of you, Derek:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You seem like the kind of person who might be willing to step up for our campaign in a huge way.
#
Derek, I'm about to ask you to do something *really* important for our campaign for Senate:
**[I'm asking you to start a monthly donation to help sustain our campaign all the way until Election Day.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220522-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20220522-5935&refcode2=5935_434096_mhdXnZ&akid=5935%2E434096%2EmhdXnZ)**
Monthly contributions are one of the best ways you can contribute right now, because they play a *big* role in determining how quickly our campaign can scale up in the coming months.
After all, our ability to do things like run TV + digital ads, grow our organizing program, + grow our staff will all be determined by our monthly budget.
**Let me be totally clear:** Monthly donations make it a LOT easier to plan the kind of important investments required to build a winning campaign in a race as competitive as this one.
**Derek, since you’re such a strong supporter of our campaign, I've gotta ask:**
[**Will you kick off a monthly donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate? Committing even a few bucks each month is one of the most impactful things you can do to help our campaign right now, so I'd be *super* grateful.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220522-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20220522-5935&refcode2=5935_434096_mhdXnZ&akid=5935%2E434096%2EmhdXnZ)
**[Donate monthly »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220522-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20220522-5935&refcode2=5935_434096_mhdXnZ&akid=5935%2E434096%2EmhdXnZ)**
**I realize that contributing monthly can sound like a big commitment, Derek.** But the reason I'm asking is because donating a little bit each month can end up making an *even bigger impact* over time than making a larger one-time gift down the road.
Monthly contributions help us plan our path forward as we build the kind of lean, strong grassroots campaign that fights for every county and every vote. Oh, and you have my word that only a teeeeny bit of our budget will go to things like Funyuns for our very best volunteers. 😂
I know that not everyone who reads this message will be able to chip in monthly -- and that's okay. But I wanted to ask you personally since you seem like the kind of person who might be willing to step up for our campaign in a huge way.
**[Can you start a monthly donation-- of any amount that makes sense for your budget -- to support our campaign in the months leading into November? A few dollars each month will go a long way in growing the kind of campaign we can be proud of.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220522-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20220522-5935&refcode2=5935_434096_mhdXnZ&akid=5935%2E434096%2EmhdXnZ)**
You're the best, Derek. Thank you. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
TL;DR: Monthly donations make a huge impact on a campaign -- especially right now, as we're working long days and nights after winning the primary. **[If you can, please start a monthly donation to grow our campaign from the very beginning.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220522-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20220522-5935&refcode2=5935_434096_mhdXnZ&akid=5935%2E434096%2EmhdXnZ)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220522-5935-footer&t=1&refcode2=5935_434096_mhdXnZ&akid=5935%2E434096%2EmhdXnZ)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: You seem like the kind of person who might be willing to step up for our campaign in a huge way. Derek, I'm about to ask you to do something really important for our campaign for Senate: Monthly contributions are one of the best ways you can contribute right now, because they play a big role in determining how quickly our campaign can scale up in the coming months. After all, our ability to do things like run TV + digital ads, grow our organizing program, + grow our staff will all be determined by our monthly budget. Let me be totally clear: Monthly donations make it a LOT easier to plan the kind of important investments required to build a winning campaign in a race as competitive as this one. Derek, since you’re such a strong supporter of our campaign, I've gotta ask: I realize that contributing monthly can sound like a big commitment, Derek. But the reason I'm asking is because donating a little bit each month can end up making an even bigger impact over time than making a larger one-time gift down the road. Monthly contributions help us plan our path forward as we build the kind of lean, strong grassroots campaign that fights for every county and every vote. Oh, and you have my word that only a teeeeny bit of our budget will go to things like Funyuns for our very best volunteers. 😂 I know that not everyone who reads this message will be able to chip in monthly -- and that's okay. But I wanted to ask you personally since you seem like the kind of person who might be willing to step up for our campaign in a huge way. You're the best, Derek. Thank you. 🙏 John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania TL;DR: Monthly donations make a huge impact on a campaign -- especially right now, as we're working long days and nights after winning the primary. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

name: Tim Ryan
subject: The two seats we need to flip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3829%2E3611125%2E9hYns4 ][IMG]

Can I explain something, folks?

Earlier this month, I became the official Democratic nominee for Ohio’s
open Senate seat. And right-wing extremist, Big Tech sellout JD Vance
officially became my opponent.

This week, Democrat John Fetterman secured the nomination for
Pennsylvania’s open Senate seat. But the GOP is locked in a tight race,
and we still don’t know who will pull off the Republican nomination.

I don’t need to tell you how important it is we win both of these races.
The current 50/50 Senate has failed time and again to deliver on the
issues that matter. And the only way forward is flipping Ohio and
Pennsylvania blue to expand our Democratic Senate majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13102?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3829%2E3611125%2E9hYns4 ]Please, rush a donation to help John and me overcome the GOP’s millions
so we can win our races and finally make progress in the Senate. Every
dollar you give will immediately go toward fighting back against the
Republican attacks heading our way.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13102?t=1009&amount=25&akid=3829%2E3611125%2E9hYns4 ]Donate

John and I have a lot in common, actually. We’ve both got strong spines
and will never back down from a tough fight—especially when it comes to
doing right by working families.

Plus, Youngstown is only a hop, skip, and a jump away from Pittsburgh (and
don’t tell John but Mason and Bella are huge Steelers fans ... no matter
how hard I try to convert them).

But here’s the most important thing we have in common: we’re both running
in open Senate seats and our races represent the best chances Democrats
have of flipping the two seats we need to expand our Democratic Senate
majority.

We can’t afford to lose in either Ohio or Pennsylvania with the
filibuster, expanding voting rights, and protecting abortion access all on
the line. So, I’m turning to you:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13102?t=1010&amount=25&akid=3829%2E3611125%2E9hYns4 ]Split a donation between John’s and my campaign right now to help us
win the races that will decide Senate control. Please, there has never
been a more important time to make a donation.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13102?t=1011&amount=25&akid=3829%2E3611125%2E9hYns4 ]Donate

Thanks so much. Let’s do this.

— Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=3829%2E3611125%2E9hYns4 ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=3829%2E3611125%2E9hYns4 ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=3829%2E3611125%2E9hYns4 ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=3829%2E3611125%2E9hYns4 ]Donate Once

Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=3829%2E3611125%2E9hYns4 ][IMG]

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zttsib8oi16njdgpguk9osappqibjhtst8e208t0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c9im8ob4chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65slim9qn1pdjesqbasb2mer68t9gemq35cljedib6dbmm5qefcdiegon1pj4s2o6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33cljc5g74cb66lib6o77m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zosg17m09ea4qern3srl5cr2u8f7lvufrlio3btg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c9im8ob4chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb390kb9kuil9ltns252156eqsohirglcuj1828g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c9im8ob4chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeu6akc7vnlmeni0fslnjeuqsqcap0n357prsakg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c9im8ob4chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2z6jaudi4aipm7opt13b8e8btpu4vhdo5migrl808).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8dkv4hp2ik6t8mvqudf6j4vndcb80e8r21ppbc8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c9im8ob4chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Trump Cabinet Official Warning
subject: Former SecDef warned us about Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
|
---

| | [Team, former Secretary of Defense, Mark Esper, who served in Donald Trump’s administration has a warning for our country, saying that Donald Trump is a threat to democracy and it would be difficult to conclude otherwise.

subject: Have you returned it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Make sure to return your ballot or GO VOTE Tuesday, May 24th!
| | | **STILL HAVE AN ABSENTEE BALLOT?** **HAND DELIVER IT BY MONDAY OR _MAIL IT IN NOW_!**
---
Peter, Time is running out – Election Day is JUST DAYS away now on Tuesday. If you’re planning to vote by absentee ballot, and have not returned your completed ballot yet, here are dates and times you need to be aware of. 🗳️ **MONDAY, MAY 23** : Hand delivered ballots must be received by 5:00 p.m. 🗳️ **TUESDAY, MAY 24** : Mailed ballots must be received no later than noon. If you’ve already submitted your ballot, and want to check on its status, you can do so here: **[https://myinfo.alabamavotes.gov/voterview](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/372b0ec64e468b62/4c53ab88361442f6c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** And if you’re planning to head out to vote in person on Tuesday, take a moment now to **[find your polling place](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/372b0ec64e468b62/d64fb2c6f32b3abdc3d6b838967d376c/33013)**! The polls will be open from 7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.

name: Nan Whaley
subject: We’re facing an alarming formula shortage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whaley/Stephens
body:
This is a moral crisis, and we need all hands on deck to help.

Team,
It’s been no secret for weeks now that we are facing a nationwide shortage of infant formula.
In Ohio and across the country, aisles containing formula are bare. Too many parents are making trip after trip to grocery stores to find the sustenance their babies need and coming up empty-handed.
More than 40 states and territories took action to help low-income parents find and afford formula for their infants before Mike DeWine took advantage of the waivers designed to help in this situation – which have been available for _three months_. It’s unacceptable.
**[We must do more to ensure that no parent is struggling to feed their infant. Add your name if you agree. ](https://act.nanwhaley.com/a/15-formula-1-1-1?ms=nw_em_220522_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220522_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=)**
****[ADD Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45627926/346775970/2051785016?ms=nw_em_220522_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220522_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTRjMjkzZS0xNGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9FuY7EYorDeUupdBVeGDndutG8PK9Mk4Nzbh2kfLCrk=&emci=5d84a531-84d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=514c293e-14da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=24357242)****
This is a moral crisis, and we need all hands on deck to help.
But Republicans are doing the exact opposite. Not only did nearly 200 Republicans in the U.S. House of Representatives vote against a bill aimed at addressing the formula shortage, but the GOP right here in Ohio is focused on forcing through a bill that would ban abortion instead of addressing this crisis.
They’re ready to force people – even survivors of rape and incest – to carry pregnancies to term, but they’re not willing to help parents access nutrition for their infants.
**[Ohio parents deserve better. Add your name now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45627929/346775972/2051785016?ms=nw_em_220522_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220522_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTRjMjkzZS0xNGRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9FuY7EYorDeUupdBVeGDndutG8PK9Mk4Nzbh2kfLCrk=&emci=5d84a531-84d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=514c293e-14da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=24357242)**

My “Democratic” opponent David Peterson is actually a Republican plant who the GOP has deployed to three different congressional districts in recent years. | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45628053/346776771/1690235765?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220522attack_dkj_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmRmMjJlNS0xNmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4a3rJsTy93O999j-K1UBIhYO5tPvwMrbWXRGWRrPnhw=)

Well friends, the first attack ad against me has dropped, and it’s illuminated the dirty tricks the GOP is playing in California. My “Democratic” opponent David Peterson is actually a Republican plant who the GOP has deployed to three different congressional districts in recent years. They have Peterson pretend to be a progressive Democrat, and then fund his attack ads against the real Democrats running. To cover their tracks, Peterson’s campaign has failed to report his campaign donors and spending to the FEC. **The GOP is so scared that I can beat Trump-endorsed Kevin Kiley in November that they’ve been playing a long con on the voters. _But we won’t be fooled._** Team, we can’t let the GOP trick their way into getting two Republicans on the November ballot. [**Can you rush a donation of any amount right now to help me combat this attack ad with the truth?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45628054/346776772/1690235765?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220522attack_dkj_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmRmMjJlNS0xNmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4a3rJsTy93O999j-K1UBIhYO5tPvwMrbWXRGWRrPnhw=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: My “Democratic” opponent David Peterson is actually a Republican plant who the GOP has deployed to three different congressional districts in recent years. | | = Well friends, the first attack ad against me has dropped, and it’s illuminated the dirty tricks the GOP is playing in California. My “Democratic” opponent David Peterson is actually a Republican plant who the GOP has deployed to three different congressional districts in recent years. They have Peterson pretend to be a progressive Democrat, and then fund his attack ads against the real Democrats running. To cover their tracks, Peterson’s campaign has failed to report his campaign donors and spending to the FEC. The GOP is so scared that I can beat Trump-endorsed Kevin Kiley in November that they’ve been playing a long con on the voters. But we won’t be fooled. Team, we can’t let the GOP trick their way into getting two Republicans on the November ballot. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for helping me set the record straight and hold these conmen accountable. Sincerely, Dr. Kermit Jones P.S. The attack ad that dropped on Friday accused me of taking bribes from Exxon and the fossil fuel industry. Here’s the truth: I have not received any corporate or fossil fuel donations. My campaign is 100% funded by grassroots supporters like you. = | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. name: Max Steiner
subject: In-Person Candidate Forum Tomorrow, May 23rd in Redding
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45628064/346776809/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWRmMjJlNS0xNmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TlUJmbwkQeJ7DKtMwLIxMshK0Xxdk0mAKPko9vp6Uvg=)
Friend,

**[There will be a candidate's forum in Redding on Monday May 23rd at the IBEW Union Hall at 900 Locust Street.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45628066/346776811/-1593943053?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWRmMjJlNS0xNmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TlUJmbwkQeJ7DKtMwLIxMshK0Xxdk0mAKPko9vp6Uvg=&emci=8944b7e1-fbd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6adf22e5-16da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=11663292)** The start time is 6:00 pm. Originally designed as a "meet and greet" for me, I convinced the other CD-1 candidates - Tim Giest (Republican) and Rose Yee (Independent) to participate as well. LaMalfa was invited, but had a "scheduling conflict."

I think a big part of running for Congress is talking with people. Too many politicians spend 23 months talking with donors and then bombard voters with advertising for a month to convince them that they are "one of them". Doug also likes to attend ribbon cuttings for infrastructure projects that he voted against. It's no surprise that, with this system, voter turnout is almost as low as Congressional approval ratings.

My campaign has been based on talking to voters. That means a lot of county fairs (like the Glenn County Fair this weekend and the Silver Dollar Fair in Chico next weekend), but it also means participating in events like this.

**[I'd love it if you could attend](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45628068/346776813/-1593943053?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWRmMjJlNS0xNmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TlUJmbwkQeJ7DKtMwLIxMshK0Xxdk0mAKPko9vp6Uvg=&emci=8944b7e1-fbd9-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=6adf22e5-16da-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=11663292)**. For those who cannot, we will post the event to YouTube after the event concludes.

Max

Peter, Stacey Abrams says a lot of “we” when she talks about Georgia. **But as a lifelong Georgian, I can tell you that her far-Left agenda will NEVER represent the peach state.** I grew up here as a pastor’s son, and I spent my days volunteering with our church, spending Sundays with our congregation, and attending bible study with my peers. **And not a SINGLE ONE of us wanted socialism, late-term abortions, and critical race theory.** **It’s time to show America who Georgians REALLY are, and as a black Christian conservative, I’m ready to lead a new generation in the battle for freedom in the peach state.** [**Join us today to take on radical Leftists like Stacey Abrams and stand up for the REAL Georgia.**](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=d1f78b7802cc4d3cbd0a9feabf8d0f94&_e=1hQ7mesSITHnwx7BZ39up2QzsAwFT9QsTVbrv63DaWllYOpRRoBu23CNG-8r761U2m3fwMm1eOjDBspfQwOaNaMDC2L_tJXOXjGg_hzfpuUnGNMPIrcoWl6fvI3v9zAqVQ2E-Y05n4xSttAmveSEysTtxN9uuekM34m1uTSRIjxyONrchuTsfMSNyhmXB93wL6lBxLnRuGloBOlwMm_O02s17lUvuXud4-RTEzyN0tlTaaeIbs3_BAFmTKIi2nZXD7gr1xqlLFCtGt-cXnQdF_P-kWkXE_EbCbzZsmP3V4biVjA-LupTO-f_kLV6tFawbKHec0fz34iB0aRqEshCBR3ln4tmyfv-EelLFVbY92zEpIf9cu00vbPVq8HlaghdA4lmOYfUFsy4SW5kZjV8IQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Peter, Stacey Abrams says a lot of “we” when she talks about Georgia. But as a lifelong Georgian, I can tell you that her far-Left agenda will NEVER represent the peach state. I grew up here as a pastor’s son, and I spent my days volunteering with our church, spending Sundays with our congregation, and attending bible study with my peers. And not a SINGLE ONE of us wanted socialism, late-term abortions, and critical race theory. It’s time to show America who Georgians REALLY are, and as a black Christian conservative, I’m ready to lead a new generation in the battle for freedom in the peach state. | | Despite what our citizens want, we are so close to losing our state to the radical Left, Peter. Between big tech censorship and the mainstream media’s lies, Democrats have a bigger advantage than ever before in the peach state. But we have a secret weapon that they NEVER will:patriots like you. name: Herschel Walker
subject: The racist hits just keep coming
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
He doesn’t understand how I can be a Black conservative. |
---
Fellow American - It's happening again.

The same liberal commentator who has been attacking me and our campaign for the last month keeps getting invited to appear on new platforms to spew his racist attacks. His newest attack came on a YouTube show.

FIRST: He penned an article for The Nation calling my candidacy _**"white insult to Black people." **_

THEN: He doubled down in his attacks on me AND Senator Tim Scott for being Black conservatives: _**"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." **_

NOW: He's continuing his racist attacks on a YouTube interview, calling me _**"a token for white people." **_

Take a look at the clip:

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=57dafe2479ac47198fab40e798422022&_e=KusY9-rmjLHWIMWUrK5LoxlzR9K93o1AlCqlL-n2ljPTgytOk0_-A5BaCt1S0zfRcgkrw_06PvGF6xKS7efunOMiwa098FehX8HWjkDZLRGxRw0u1kQrG_1yynTnWcjKfHrmLPI3487EIb2dvXnpALq478hJ6kYuSeNdFK-EZWvSFeZcX-CvDiXUkY_rdPDKnAnFm4Zb2ha_lU4ByxwICPRYL6LbfIvAbXKWrE479Ah4jTRj_sT1F360zAZ4AT-Xf2k7WwgojPPTNSmzcbFssbxoCBzu7TFlER66SsvFgJxLsDZKblh8KKl4vrGdkdSKeGWmHwlC6BT-kJDPreXeVnJDgt2lUi0BiLI_x4OOcc6oOGIOmBGxdimVBW3W6kTZu2iKUPFI7a6l0035sj-B_UDgus4c0SjvZ4Eh9cgf7OhPGFNzRzodUicwREPp6HEOyrtmyARLUJOvr1kaCSTs6BB17jzhPMYbbDmUEZqT2bU3g49DFofPGfgBzXVRnXAu)
I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character, the way I communicate, and my skin color have gone too far.

I invited my critic to dinner so we could come together and find common ground, but he belittled my invitation. He doesn't understand how I can be a Black conservative.

**[Will you help me send a clear message to people who think this way?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=57dafe2479ac47198fab40e798422022&_e=KusY9-rmjLHWIMWUrK5LoxlzR9K93o1AlCqlL-n2ljPTgytOk0_-A5BaCt1S0zfRcgkrw_06PvGF6xKS7efunOMiwa098FehX8HWjkDZLRGxRw0u1kQrG_1yynTnWcjKfHrmLPI3487EIb2dvXnpALq478hJ6kYuSeNdFK-EZWvSFeZcX-CvDiXUkY_rdPDKnAnFm4Zb2ha_lU4ByxwICPRYL6LbfIvAbXKWrE479Ah4jTRj_sT1F360zAZ4AT-Xf2k7WwgojPPTNSmzcbFssbxoCBzu7TFlER66SsvFgJxoBtaRxx-Z6QjTzTrbm0O05-lSJi9X8iAvIwFuadhYougNkba5qOslAPVgjKkTQOAGaY1NJn2CqAaINHQ-XJMjpY5ojOy5mketb3x-SuGbHklv7_ivDbo5QaRZucSUTYeVkMLadNs4-8Hq8rY3kwgfQm-0mS3eiInnFuHacvj2Pn8p6E7x1_xQWX8Ostyngh8TD07aoaQween8TN-nncDK)**

**I won't be quiet about this.** People who say horrible things about their fellow human beings based on the color of their skin are simply wrong.

**[We hope you'll take a moment today to support our Senate campaign and show the people who want us to fail just how much support there is for Black conservatives in this country.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=57dafe2479ac47198fab40e798422022&_e=KusY9-rmjLHWIMWUrK5LoxlzR9K93o1AlCqlL-n2ljPTgytOk0_-A5BaCt1S0zfRcgkrw_06PvGF6xKS7efunOMiwa098FehX8HWjkDZLRGxRw0u1kQrG_1yynTnWcjKfHrmLPI3487EIb2dvXnpALq478hJ6kYuSeNdFK-EZWvSFeZcX-CvDiXUkY_rdPDKnAnFm4Zb2ha_lU4ByxwICPRYL6LbfIvAbXKWrE479Ah4jTRj_sT1F360zAZ4AT-Xf2k7WwgojPPTNSmzcbFssbxoCBzu7TFlER66SsvFgJxZRDacp7ubA4EEMsav4QU8vClBCXED7oe9viuAce4nu5JJGaWLGiMs_qwye7rDE3T4JnLNPBC6VF9OQNmSAh7ZGiWwhbANrf30gPJQGzdEibecjRoOf88Kf88RxfuT1X5VchKZnS7KLoEvP-gmv5WpTTnI7_i5N7QX3ix2FJVS2FiSwklNUs2E-Xfwmus9gX-nwDo_oyFHvs7LoY9mbskq)**

Fellow American, please stand with me today.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=57dafe2479ac47198fab40e798422022&_e=KusY9-rmjLHWIMWUrK5LoxlzR9K93o1AlCqlL-n2ljPTgytOk0_-A5BaCt1S0zfRcgkrw_06PvGF6xKS7efunOMiwa098FehX8HWjkDZLRGxRw0u1kQrG_1yynTnWcjKfHrmLPI3487EIb2dvXnpALq478hJ6kYuSeNdFK-EZWvSFeZcX-CvDiXUkY_rdPDKnAnFm4Zb2ha_lU4ByxwICPRYL6LbfIvAbXKWrE479Ah4jTRj_sT1F360zAZ4AT-Xf2k7WwgojPPTNSmzcbFssbxoCBzu7TFlER66SsvFgJx16rFamdB5J6ogJjSBuW4elCvhlNHjZMiWk9_YBv1LXrvx0r6Uuqmas-wDhp5v5scAiYuy58l97dPoyFuNeV02_W4KoSjf19CMnC1XHjrl42tYr7hCD6tBkHX8FcUQVuPIU5cpbn-8nKzAh-SqFDSaPBO321ZzPh9wJN4Bx_esywGvnyGKSB6WY_a2mOrbyPGA8hLFB4rvqCZFn8ogekeO)
