clean_body: He doesn’t understand how I can be a Black conservative. | Fellow American - It's happening again. The same liberal commentator who has been attacking me and our campaign for the last month keeps getting invited to appear on new platforms to spew his racist attacks. His newest attack came on a YouTube show. FIRST: He penned an article for The Nation calling my candidacy "white insult to Black people." THEN: He doubled down in his attacks on me AND Senator Tim Scott for being Black conservatives: "I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." NOW: He's continuing his racist attacks on a YouTube interview, calling me "a token for white people." Take a look at the clip: I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character, the way I communicate, and my skin color have gone too far. I invited my critic to dinner so we could come together and find common ground, but he belittled my invitation. He doesn't understand how I can be a Black conservative. I won't be quiet about this. People who say horrible things about their fellow human beings based on the color of their skin are simply wrong. Fellow American, please stand with me today. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Peter,

**$110 MILLION.**

That's how much money Donald Trump has across his various campaign accounts and super PACs – and it's all dedicated to taking back the control of Washington this November. Do you know who was one of the first extremist Republicans he rallied behind this election? **Our opponent, Chuck Grassley.**
There is no question that Trump’s game plan is already in motion: first, he'll try to protect vulnerable incumbents like his top ally Sen. Grassley (R-IA) so they can dismantle the Democratic majority. Then, he'll try to get back the presidency.

This "comeback tour" kicked off right here in Iowa, with Sen. Chuck Grassley sharing the stage with the former president.
The moral compass of the Republican Party shattered as soon as their violent mob attacked the Capitol, and they have nothing but us keeping them accountable. We cannot let extremist GOP members like Sen. Grassley and Trump dictate what the future of Iowa and our country will be. **Iowans know this and are ready for change: that's why only 27% of likely Iowa voters said they want to reelect Sen. Grassley.**

But going up against the war chests of Trump, McConnell, Sen. Grassley and their allies requires unprecedented grassroots support – and we still haven't closed in on our $20,000 grassroots fundraising goal for today. body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/d_BKzKE9rHG0RnxiQEfSRLDxQVXpJJ0sqtJEbIXZXuM=/xSp_bvrMO9MKTFG0V_dEQiU21ALinqHSazwo1ue32PM=)
---
With the Supreme Court poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , it's now up to states to protect the right to choose.
Eventually, we need Congress to pass the Women's Health Protection Act. With Joe Manchin and Republicans in the way, that likely won't happen until **after** _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned _._
So in the meantime, it's up to blue states to protect their own residents AND women who are being forced to cross state lines to get care.
**We 're calling on Democratic states to pass laws that codify abortion rights.**
**[You can join us in this fight by adding your name here >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/d_BKzKE9rHG0RnxiQEfSRLDxQVXpJJ0sqtJEbIXZXuM=/djrKYTnuNh5sca2FsB-L7J35Ldb-XCbgU5w40duGiwQ=?source=2022bluestatesrepro_HT&referrer=group-her-time&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fhtfrontline%3Frefcode%3DX_BlueStatesAbortion)**
Thank you!
-- _[HER-Time.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/d_BKzKE9rHG0RnxiQEfSRLDxQVXpJJ0sqtJEbIXZXuM=/zRJa7pVsu-_Z41rCDwRhJWwLssLaarrG9KxyISpfqBM=)_

* * *
In 2018, Katie Hill beat the odds and flipped CA-25 blue for the first time in over two decades. Her message of systemic change resonated with voters, and though she's no longer in Congress, she's still fighting to make a difference. **After stepping down from her seat, Katie founded HER Time to help elect candidates like her: women who are overlooked and underestimated.** **You can help HER Time**[**support Democratic women up and down the ballot by donating now**](https://act.myngp.com/el/d_BKzKE9rHG0RnxiQEfSRLDxQVXpJJ0sqtJEbIXZXuM=/Ss0RfJKVYjmH7Pnw3iWYGcuR5PPCDxEywZzuliwgYa4=?refcode=footer)**, and**[**learn more about our mission here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/d_BKzKE9rHG0RnxiQEfSRLDxQVXpJJ0sqtJEbIXZXuM=/xSp_bvrMO9MKTFG0V_dEQiU21ALinqHSazwo1ue32PM=)**.** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Kris, Team DASS
subject: looking for input from top Ohio Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Hey Team!
My name is Kris, and I just joined the DASS Team as the digital director.
As part of settling into my new role, I’m looking to hear from top grassroots voting-rights supporters in Ohio. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/2022-voting-rights-strat-survey]
If you’ve got a moment, could you fill out our quick 2022 voting rights priority survey? It’ll only take a few moments (I promise!) and it’ll help inform our strategy in this critical election year. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/2022-voting-rights-strat-survey]
START THE SURVEY >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/2022-voting-rights-strat-survey]
While our opponents are being bankrolled by Trump’s billionaire friends in the MAGA fundraising network, DASS is building our 2022 election strategy around dedicated grassroots activists like you.
But with at least 23 Election Deniers running for Secretary of State in 18 states, democracy is on the ballot this November in a way it never has before. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/2022-voting-rights-strat-survey]
That’s why we need to hear from top Democrats in Ohio on how to build an airtight midterm strategy.
This quick survey will help us plan out our strategy for the rest of the year, so it’s critical that we have as many responses as possible. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/2022-voting-rights-strat-survey]

Thanks for your time and input!
Kris

name: Team JD
subject: We have another primary to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We only have two days left to defeat the only anti-abortion Democrat in
the House, Henry Cuellar. He’s the only Democrat in the House to vote
against abortion rights and he even accepted an award from March for Life,
an extreme anti-choice group.

Despite his conservative views, Cuellar has the backing of all the same
leaders and funders of the Democratic establishment. Nancy Pelosi is
supporting him, even though he opposes pro-choice legislation. Wall
Street, Big Oil, private prison companies, and even Republican mega-donors
are sending him money.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106886?refcode=em20220522-23453&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=23453%2E1203867%2EgFm5fJ ]Like in Summer Lee’s race, it’s the people vs. big corporate money.
And we need to lift Jessica to victory, just like we did for Summer. Can
you chip in $3 today to help us defeat Cuellar and the
political establishment?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106886?refcode=em20220522-23453&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=23453%2E1203867%2EgFm5fJ ]Contribute $3

By backing Cuellar, Democratic House leadership and Nancy Pelosi show how
out of touch they are with Democratic voters. We must ensure that we
defeat anti-abortion Democrats, and we must ensure our leaders support
pro-choice candidates.

Democratic leadership is siding with Wall Street, fossil fuel executives,
and Republican billionaires when it supports Cuellar. But we’re with
Jessica and we just fought hard to win Summer’s primary in Pennsylvania —
up against millions in corporate Super PAC money.

We must fight back against the establishment’s attacks.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106886?refcode=em20220522-23453&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=23453%2E1203867%2EgFm5fJ ]Can you rush a contribution to Justice Democrats right now? We need to
battle against millions in Super PAC spending and we need to elect Jessica
on Tuesday.

Thank you for all that you do to support our work and our primary
candidates.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=23453%2E1203867%2EgFm5fJ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=23453%2E1203867%2EgFm5fJ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220522-23453-footer&t=1025&refcode2=23453_1203867_gFm5fJ&akid=23453%2E1203867%2EgFm5fJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=23453%2E1203867%2EgFm5fJ

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Peter, can you be a founding donor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’ve built our movement on the support of small-dollar donations.
#
Peter,
I am so excited to announce my re-election campaign for Washington’s 7th Congressional District.
This campaign is not only about ensuring that I’m re-elected so I can keep fighting to deliver for the people, this campaign is also about working hard to keep our Democratic majority and elect more people-first progressives to join me in the House.
My campaign relies on grassroots donations from supporters like you, and not a cent in corporate PAC money. So, whether you’ve given in the past or haven’t donated yet, I am asking:
[**Can you help me kick off our 2022 campaign with a groundswell of support by becoming a founding donor of my re-election campaign? $3 will help us do the work of holding our House majority and lifting up progressive candidates.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13880?refcode=em20220522-1285&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1285%2E420207%2EKxQekO)
**[Become a founding donor »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13880?refcode=em20220522-1285&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1285%2E420207%2EKxQekO)**
When I’m talking to voters in our district or out campaigning for one of the progressives I’ve endorsed in their 2022 races, I am always thinking about how we can deliver for the people.
That means policies like Medicare for All, the PRO Act, the Women’s Health Protection Act, bold action on climate change, and canceling student debt. It also means pushing our majority to take important steps towards these goals — by lowering health care costs for working families, protecting workers, securing strong environmental regulations, and more.
The only way we can achieve these things in 2023 and beyond is if we hold our Democratic majority and grow our Congressional Progressive Caucus.
**I know you're with me in this work, Peter, and it would mean so much to me and my team if you stepped up today to donate $3 as we launch our re-election campaign.**
[**Become a founding donor for our 2022 re-election campaign and help us build towards our bold progressive vision for this country.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13880?refcode=em20220522-1285&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1285%2E420207%2EKxQekO)
Thank you for being by my side.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220522-1285-footer&t=22&refcode2=1285_420207_KxQekO&akid=1285%2E420207%2EKxQekO)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=1285%2E420207%2EKxQekO)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1285%2E420207%2EKxQekO)

Friend – this isn't good.

After The Miami Times reported that I was closing the polling gap, Rubio and the GOP fell back on their multimillion-dollar war chest in another desperate attempt to smear my name.

I know I come to you a lot, friend, but believe me when I say that I wouldn't be asking if I didn't think it was crucial to winning this race. The Florida media market is expensive, and if I don't have the money I need to reach more voters with my _true_ story, Floridians may be swayed by Rubio's lies – and I could lose this race.

name: Our Revolution
subject: Why is Nancy Pelosi collaborating with an anti-choice extremist?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| Peter Willis, did you see the team's message?

Abortion rights are on the ballot on Tuesday, with **Our Revolution-backed Jessica Cisneros** taking on**anti-choice "Democrat" Henry Cuellar** \-- who is inexplicably backed by Nancy Pelosi.

**[Peter Willis, will you rush a donation to help us support Jessica Cisneros, Jasmine Crockett, and other endorsed candidates before Tuesday's Texas primary runoff?](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5550?t=11&akid=2946%2E5885482%2EDG7mC9)**

_\---Begin Forwarded Message----_
Peter Willis,

In just days, **Jessica Cisneros' runoff** against **Henry Cuellar, the last anti-choice Democrat in the US House** , will set the tone for how our party responds to the assault on women’s rights.

The **far-right** is laser-focused on dismantling reproductive and privacy rights in America, and right-wing Democrats like **Joe Manchin** helped kill a vote last week to codify Roe v. Wade. Sadly, the enemies of women are in both parties, and we can beat one of the worst on Tuesday.

Our Revolution is working hard to elect pro-choice candidates like Jessica Cisneros vs. anti-choice corporate puppets like Henry Cuellar — even if **Nancy Pelosi** and the most destructive special interest groups are standing with him instead of women's reproductive freedom.

**[With the future of our rights on the ballot on Tuesday, can we count on you to rush a donation to help beat the last anti-choice "Democrat" in the House? Super PACs are flooding money into Texas to fund attack ads that lie about Jessica Cisneros, and we need to fight back!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5550?t=12&akid=2946%2E5885482%2EDG7mC9)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately._ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW »](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5470?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MO_20220522_1_2&t=13&akid=2946%2E5885482%2EDG7mC9)

| [CHIP IN $18 NOW »](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5471?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MO_20220522_1_2&t=14&akid=2946%2E5885482%2EDG7mC9)
---
| [CHIP IN $27 NOW »](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5472?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MO_20220522_1_2&t=15&akid=2946%2E5885482%2EDG7mC9)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW »](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5473?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MO_20220522_1_2&t=16&akid=2946%2E5885482%2EDG7mC9)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW »](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5474?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MO_20220522_1_2&t=17&akid=2946%2E5885482%2EDG7mC9)
---
| [CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5469?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MO_20220522_1_2&t=18&akid=2946%2E5885482%2EDG7mC9)
---
Jessica Cisneros isn't our only champion on the ballot on Tuesday!

In the 30th District, we have endorsed **Jasmine Crockett** , an Our Revolution member who has been serving as a strong progressive fighter in the Texas House of Representatives.

Jasmine established herself as a national leader in the fight for voting rights during last summer's walkout to block Texas Republicans' package of ominous new election restrictions. She is also a champion for criminal justice reform and the environment and is a founding member of the Texas Progressive Caucus.

**[Can we count on you to support Jessica, Jasmine, and our other endorsed candidates before Tuesday's critical primary?](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5550?t=19&akid=2946%2E5885482%2EDG7mC9)**

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

**This is HUGE news for our campaign, Peter.**

Our race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive House races _in the country_ and it could be the race that determines which party controls the House majority in November. This endorsement comes at a crucial moment when our June 7th primary is just days away.

[**Flipping CA-27 from red to blue is possible – but only if we can keep up our momentum. Help us continue to power our campaign through our primary by making a donation of $5 or more today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45629588/346783757/1076724892?refcode=em22_220522_LATimes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWEwYWMxZi0yN2RhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FxW1xpNiQu8Bnx6nivWJeikoJ33CN5_XxH_11Ze2MUE=)

The choice couldn’t be more clear. In Congress, Christy will fight for Californians by working to protect voting rights, make college more affordable, fight for reproductive rights, and so much more.

On the other hand, Mike Garcia isn’t fighting for the people – and his record proves it. In just the last few DAYS he’s:
* Voted against legislation that would have provided emergency fund to address the infant formula shortage;
* Voted against legislation to stop price gouging at gas stations as we continue to face rising costs at the pump;
* And voted against legislation that would confront the issue of domestic terrorism in the wake of a mass shooting in Buffalo, NY.

You get the picture. We don’t know who Mike Garcia is fighting for, but it’s not the people he was elected to serve. And California’s largest newspaper is making sure voters know it.

[**The race for CA-27 is on and we need your help to ensure we come out on top in our June 7th primary. Chip in $5 or more to ensure we can continue to spread Christy’s message across the district ahead of our primary.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45629589/346783758/1076724892?refcode=em22_220522_LATimes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWEwYWMxZi0yN2RhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FxW1xpNiQu8Bnx6nivWJeikoJ33CN5_XxH_11Ze2MUE=)

clean_body: | | = This is HUGE news for our campaign, Peter. Our race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive House races in the country and it could be the race that determines which party controls the House majority in November. This endorsement comes at a crucial moment when our June 7th primary is just days away. = The choice couldn’t be more clear. In Congress, Christy will fight for Californians by working to protect voting rights, make college more affordable, fight for reproductive rights, and so much more. On the other hand, Mike Garcia isn’t fighting for the people – and his record proves it. In just the last few DAYS he’s: Voted against legislation that would have provided emergency fund to address the infant formula shortage; Voted against legislation to stop price gouging at gas stations as we continue to face rising costs at the pump; And voted against legislation that would confront the issue of domestic terrorism in the wake of a mass shooting in Buffalo, NY. You get the picture. We don’t know who Mike Garcia is fighting for, but it’s not the people he was elected to serve. And California’s largest newspaper is making sure voters know it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Your support over the next few weeks will be absolutely critical. – Team Christy = = P.S. If you’re as excited about this endorsement as we are, your friends and family and tell them why you’re supporting Christy on June 7th!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Beckwith?=
subject: Dave Beckwith for Congress - Thank you for a Great Campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE DAVE BECKWITH FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE**
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davebeckwithforcongress.com/dave-beckwith-for-congress-fighting-for-americas-future-9022623?e=70e89e3dc3)
---
| | [ ](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=313e4d0285&e=70e89e3dc3)
---
| |
---
# THE BECKWITH BRIEFING

#### Thank you for your support!
---
| | **Dear Virginian Voter, **

Yesterday was an incredibly exciting day. Despite the record heat, voter turnout for the Virginia 10th District GOP Primary was higher than expected. My supporters and voters at all 11 polling places across five counties represented my campaign brilliantly - undeterred by strong sun, large crowds, and long lines. I'm humbled by your dedication and the trust you placed in me to represent your voice in Congress.

Unfortunately, District 10 decided another GOP candidate was the right choice to face Jennifer Wexton in this fall's general election. While I'm deeply disappointed my campaign ends here, I don't view this as a loss. Thanks to faithful donors and supporters like you, I was able to reach voters across VA10 with a message of optimism and opportunity that's helped kindle a spirit of determination that will propel the GOP forward in November. I'm beyond proud of the work we've done together to inspire our friends and neighbors to see beyond the challenges we've faced as a community and a nation over the last two years and push towards a brighter, freer future.

I ask that you give your support to District 10's GOP nominee, Hung Cao. Hung is a veteran and a patriot; he supports the conservative values and Constitutional freedoms VA10 and America so desperately need to reclaim. Hung will face many obstacles to winning a majority vote in November, so I encourage you to engage with his campaign to give input and support to help propel it forward.

I know you hoped for a different outcome yesterday -- I certainly did. But we should feel nothing but pride and a sense of accomplishment. We ran an extremely professional, positive, organized campaign that competed well against those twice our size. We left nothing on the table, and I'm confident our work will help turn Virginia "red" this November.

>From the bottom of my heart, I once again thank you for your donations, your time, your prayers, and your encouragement. It's been an honor to represent you in this primary and I'm forever grateful for what you've done.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
|
---
---

Hello,
It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.”
Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well.
Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over.
January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. **To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy.** An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and blocked a bipartisan commission to investigate the attack, still has yet to occur.
The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection.
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, **I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors _like you_.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, donate $5 or more to my campaign right now – every dollar you can before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45629805/346785931/-42398318?refcode=em20220522pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTI5MWM0Zi0yYmRhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YOqyENI_7x3iGkbdj9CunqtRpxyphzHPtzs3klMiRCk=)

One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors like you. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We can – and we must – protect our democracy. Thank you for always being a part of the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Folks – from gerrymandering to voter suppression to trying to overturn the results of the 2020 election, we’ve seen example after example of Republican cheating. That’s why A.G. Holder launched the NDRC in the first place – to combat some of the most egregious examples of that cheating.

And [_thanks to your support_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45629860/346786374/1731801576?amount=20&refcode=20220521.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjMjkxYzRmLTJiZGEtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_M4V-u3SSKvDXd6JYmJyPzOOCE7g5AogOiV77aawx4s=), we’ve had a lot of success. As President Obama said of the 2022 elections, “It’s now unlikely that control of the [U.S. House of Representatives] will be determined strictly by the way maps are drawn.”

| | Hey friends – it’s Team Patty. We have a mid-month finance update to share with top supporters: We’re behind where we wanted to be at this point in May. If Patty is going to remain competitive against a big-money opponent, **we need to bring in 163 more donations before the deadline at 11:59 PM on May 31st.** [Donate $10 or more to elect Patty Pansing Brooks »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45630045/346789775/333259033?amount=10&refcode=em_220522_163donors_rs&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220522_163donors_rs&refcode2=b2f27ab1-2cda-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmYyN2FiMS0yY2RhLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EBtWhKXpt08Ci7qpucj-bv78gum0jSKHCPKP08W-kP8=) The Special Election on June 28 is the perfect opportunity to shake up the status quo and elect a representative who will truly use her voice for our communities. subject: Greetings from Beth Hampson for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid For by Beth Hampson for Congress
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/3e8d23796b52/greetings-from-beth-hampson-for-congress?e=bfedc5d683)
Dear Friend,

I hope this Spring is treating you well.

Thank you for subscribing to updates from my campaign for the U.S. House of Representatives (Congress) in California’s District 2. I appreciate your interest and your support!

As a grassroots candidate and toddler mom working full-time in public education, I have worked hard to reach supporters and voters through multiple modes. You, my fair email subscriber, have heard from the campaign less than the rest. It’s time to remedy that. As the primary election is upon us, I’m reaching out with a campaign update.

WHY RUN?

Here are a few things worth knowing about why, as a lifelong educator and first-time candidate, I've chosen to run for Congress.

I am running for Congress because I want to enact policy at the national level and lead a congressional staff focused on providing high-quality constituent services. I began exploring running in October, 2021, when the lines for congressional districts in California had yet to be finalized and it appeared that District 2 might be without an incumbent. Once the lines had been finalized in late December, the district lines were essentially unchanged, and the district had a sitting Democratic incumbent.

I still chose to run. Why?

I believe that districts don’t belong to incumbents, and democracy thrives when people have choices. As an educational leader I’ve long seen firsthand how pressing and often interconnected problems impact children, adults, and families in our communities. I want to work on more issues that impact more people, from housing to healthcare to making our region more resilient to wildfires, droughts, and power outages.

I am passionate about serving all the people of District 2, urban to suburban to rural. I have consistently heard from people in rural parts of the district that they do not feel well represented by their congressional leadership.

I am invested in listening to and learning from residents throughout the region, doing all that I can to understand their concerns, and providing balanced representation focused on crafting real and lasting solutions.

The pandemic served as a stark reminder that we live in uncertain times, and that life does not promise us anything. Becoming a new mother to my daughter has also created a very personal sense of urgency for me. I want our world to be worthy of coming generations.

There has not been a more critical time for people with good judgment, sound character, compassion, and courage to step forward in the spirit of service and offer to lead. I see my campaign for this congressional seat as my offering to my community. It has been and continues to be one of the greatest experiences of learning and service of my life, and I am grateful to every friend, colleague, neighbor, supporter, and stranger who has shared their experiences, viewpoints, thoughts, and hopes about the future of their communities and this country with me.

Thank you for being part of this journey.

More to come, and soon.

Beth Hampson

Paid For by Beth Hampson for Congress

name: Lindsey Keesling
subject: Ready to get involved? ¿Listo para el trabajo?
body:
We will win this primary, but we will need every volunteer we can find. Ganaremos esta primaria, pero necesitaremos a todos los voluntarios
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/53O3jS0p0/c?w=mMzhEUoQOI6LpWaOVxFHSYY9zOea4OVdIA4fTGn3Wtg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL3NvLzUzTzNqUzBwMD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)_**

| | Ready to get involved?¿Listo para el trabajo?
---
| | We will win this primary, but we will need every volunteer we can find.Ganaremos esta primaria, pero necesitaremos a todos los voluntarios que podamos encontrar.
---
| | |
---
| | We have a variety of upcoming events that anyone could help with- regardless of their prior experience in volunteering. If you can hold a phone or a pen and care about democracy, we have a way to get votes out with your help! We need to reach 65000 people in June, and we know from multiple studies of prior elections that the biggest motivator is personal contact. That's where you can make a difference! You can be that point of contact that makes the difference between a ballot in the mail or in the trash. Will you help?Tenemos una variedad de próximos eventos con los que cualquiera podría ayudar, independientemente de su experiencia previa como voluntario. Si puede sostener un teléfono o un bolígrafo y se preocupa por la democracia, ¡tenemos una manera de obtener votos con su ayuda! Necesitamos llegar a 65000 personas en junio, y sabemos por múltiples estudios de elecciones anteriores que el mayor motivador es el contacto personal. ¡Ahí es donde usted puede marcar la diferencia! Usted puede ser ese punto de contacto que marque la diferencia entre una boleta en el correo o en la basura. ¿Ayudará?
---
| | Upcoming Opportunities:
---
| | VOLUNTEER INFORMATION MEETING:Thursday May 26th at 4:00pm on ZoomLearn about all the various ways you can support the campaign! PHONE BANKING:Every Tuesday (5:00-6:00pm) and Thursday (6:30-7:30pm)If you don't want to use your own phone number, Google Voice can make phone banking anonymous and safe.DOOR TO DOOR OUTREACH:Every Saturday from 10:00-1:00pm and 3:00-6:00pmLocations vary: we would like to be in both Yakima and Tri-Cities weekly but we need volunteer coordinators to make it happen! Would you like to help? [Contact us](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/53O3jS0p0/c?w=IWQuouB7SliWpp_N9wovMmw2xQwaEDC6Woynrd3RyeE.eyJ1IjoibWFpbHRvOmNhbXBhaWdubWFuYWdlckBkb3Vnd2hpdGU0Y29uZ3Jlc3MudXMiLCJyIjoiMGU2ZjYxNzgtNGFlZi00Yjk2LTk5MmQtNDRhZjg4OGU0YzUzIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDQ5NmZmZTAtYzBiYS00NjA2LTk5ODYtYzI4MDM3ZThkMTU1In0)!LETTER WRITING:You can have letter writing supplies and an address list delivered right to your home and work on it when you like- or contact us to get connected to a letter writing event in your community.

name: Beto for Texas
subject: This is how we’re going to win in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Will you support our organizing work?
#
**The way we’re going to win in Texas is by going everywhere and bringing everyone in.**
It’s going to take meeting Texans where they live. Listening to them about the challenges that keep them up at night, and the things that they aspire to achieve.
It’ll take hosting events, big and small, where people have the opportunity to listen to each other and find common ground on the issues that matter most.
And it’s going to take knocking on doors in every part of Texas, reminding every Texan why these elections matter. Too many Texans will tell you that they’re tired of seeing nothing change — year after year and election after election.
After decades of voter suppression, disenfranchisement, and being made to feel like their vote won’t make a difference,**it’s up to us to partner with Texans to give them a reason to believe in change.**
It isn’t going to be easy, but there’s nothing more important that we could be doing right now.
[Will you consider giving $3 or more right now to support our organizing work to elect Beto as the next Governor of Texas? Your support will help us host events, hire organizers to knock on doors, and put fuel in the van to help us travel and connect with folks across the state.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220522-2?refcode=ema20220522-190500&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=190500_444211_R2JtQF&akid=190500%2E444211%2ER2JtQF)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220522-2?refcode=ema20220522-190500&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=190500_444211_R2JtQF&akid=190500%2E444211%2ER2JtQF)**
If there’s one thing that’s clear from Beto’s years and years of serving folks in Texas, it’s that we’ve got to work together to get the big things done. It’s the only way we’re going to get past the extreme, divisive politics that we see in Texas today, and get back to the big, bold vision that used to define Texas.
[A contribution of any amount — even just a few dollars — will support our effort to make this a campaign of, by, and for the people of Texas.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220522-2?refcode=ema20220522-190500&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=190500_444211_R2JtQF&akid=190500%2E444211%2ER2JtQF)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220522-2?refcode=ema20220522-190500&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=190500_444211_R2JtQF&akid=190500%2E444211%2ER2JtQF)
Let’s keep going,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220522-190500-footer&t=23&refcode2=190500_444211_R2JtQF&akid=190500%2E444211%2ER2JtQF)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=24&akid=190500%2E444211%2ER2JtQF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=190500%2E444211%2ER2JtQF)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: VICTORY

I could not have done it without all of your incredible hard work, and my family and I are forever grateful for you.

Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 15th Congressional District. If you no longer wish to receive emails, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sSRynqGvEUuAD1QP3hBpsA2?unsubscribedata=FFZ34qIcrLRH1yRglfTbm%2Bh%2FdeBnRsHEhEIiAb7WpyG5oRWzJY3Q498yWh0w%2B1WVa7lPN2VnAYePwZluFr9Vfm%2BWqs7pPlQlE1OEgHE4VIVzLwwmGZfEvgKFW379Bqw%2B1onIDacGHnOaz64OsqUHCBd8UN6%2BX4E%2FhFzx0vAHj4THQVK%2FroAQRAsgS8LgwnBTIkhwR%2B2oIBrOXsFAgMhz0bADj9VEeTA7tqRr6mcJcf8bmAlLTJn%2F67ySBa6lXeR9zxFjo9PoL9Exzc%2BjW5rz52ABnyquJQTcjDk3hIyK%2Fson0%2FyC0Lvcj9RC5lAA%2BFnpIoZddY3iAtUx05FXGaekl7wxy76fpcXNRfdKnZx5egFLBzgyhBmDFUyL%2B7x5ks2YhAqe3ocG%2Bron84igxUK7CTlbsqfQM2FBZovq7bqeiek%3D .

I’m going to say something bold because I believe it: 2022 is our year to take on the extremism of the MAGA Party.

I know it sounds overwhelming and difficult, but we’ve been here before and we can do it again.

Can you chip in, team, to help us take on the MAGA mob and protect our democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-May2022-FR-May?refcode=E15814-20220522-MAGAism-SL-Trump-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

Trumpian candidates are running across the country hoping the more extreme they are, the more Democrats will just tune-out and give-up. They are hoping we will surrender the reigns of power to their toxic brand of white supremacy, fearmongering, and out-of-touch extremism.

This midterm election is not just important, it’s a referendum. Trump and his Republican cronies have already done so much damage to our democracy, and it’s up to us to stop them.

HELP US TAKE ON THE GOP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-May2022-FR-May?refcode=E15814-20220522-MAGAism-SB-Trump-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

We have so much work to do, and their network of extremists is already unraveling: On Tuesday, candidates that were hand-picked by Trump lost their elections.

We’ve worked too damn hard to give up now. Our democracy and our hopes for progress are on the line and we are going to need everyone in this fight.

Can you rush a donation before midnight tonight to help us power through these primaries for our best chance to take on the MAGA Party? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-May2022-FR-May?refcode=E15814-20220522-MAGAism-SL-Trump-RegTemplate-NA-NA]

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-May2022-FR-May?refcode=E15814-20220522-MAGAism-SB-Trump-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

It. Can. Happen.

Eric

name: John Fetterman
subject: here's the story behind my tattoos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=269%2E5257348%2EaANU6c ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Hey Derek, it’s John.

We both know I don’t look like a typical politician. Maybe that’s why my
tattoos are *literally* the first thing people Google about me.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20220522_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=269_5257348_aANU6c&akid=269%2E5257348%2EaANU6c ][IMG]

Well enough Googling. Today I’ll tell you about my tattoos myself.

On my left arm I have the zip code 15104. That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania,
my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 13 years.
Gisele and I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the
street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20220522_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&refcode2=269_5257348_aANU6c&akid=269%2E5257348%2EaANU6c ][IMG]

On my right arm I have nine different dates. These are the dates when
people were killed through violence in Braddock while I served as Mayor,
starting in 2006. Seven out of nine were gun deaths. I actually have to
get one more date added because in June of 2018, there was another tragic
loss of life. My heart breaks every time I’m reminded of that.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20220522_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&refcode2=269_5257348_aANU6c&akid=269%2E5257348%2EaANU6c ][IMG]

My first tattoo came after January 16, 2006. It was my second week on the
job as mayor after winning my election by a single vote. I received a call
and was summoned to a police crime scene where a pizza delivery man had
been robbed and killed by gun violence.

Every time Braddock lost someone was the worst feeling in the world,
Derek.

In a close-knit community like Braddock, it’s very likely that you know
the victim and their family. It’s an incredibly wrenching and personal
experience as a mayor — but nothing compared to what the families have to
go through.

In my 13 years as mayor, I worked with the community to take on gun
violence and other important issues that Braddock faced every day. I
helped initiate youth + art programs for the students of our community and
we worked together to create a community center.

We also worked to develop buildings that had been written off,
kick-started our economy, and reduced deadly violence. My proudest moment
as mayor of Braddock is when our community went 5 1⁄2 years without the loss
of life due to gun violence.

Derek, I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania because
I believe *every* community is worth fighting for. Just like Braddock.

It is my promise to you that I'll fight for you + your community as if it
were my very own.

That promise is written on my arms. Literally. ❤️

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20220522_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&refcode2=269_5257348_aANU6c&akid=269%2E5257348%2EaANU6c ][IMG]

In order to build the kind of Democratic U.S. Senate campaign that can
flip Pennsylvania blue + fight for every community, however, the honest
truth is that we need to raise a lot of money right now. A big part of
that is online activists like you chipping in when you can.

And now that I am *officially* the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate, the
team and I could *really* use everyone’s help right now.

So, I gotta ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20220522_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&refcode2=269_5257348_aANU6c&akid=269%2E5257348%2EaANU6c ]Will you please chip in $10 or more to our campaign and Adam Schiff’s
right now, Derek? Every dollar helps Adam defend our House
Majority and send me to the U.S. Senate where I’ll fight like hell for
your community just like I fight for mine.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to John Fetterman and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20220522_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1009&refcode2=269_5257348_aANU6c&akid=269%2E5257348%2EaANU6c ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20220522_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1010&refcode2=269_5257348_aANU6c&akid=269%2E5257348%2EaANU6c ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20220522_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1011&refcode2=269_5257348_aANU6c&akid=269%2E5257348%2EaANU6c ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20220522_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1012&refcode2=269_5257348_aANU6c&akid=269%2E5257348%2EaANU6c ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20220522_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1013&refcode2=269_5257348_aANU6c&akid=269%2E5257348%2EaANU6c ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em_fetterman?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20220522_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&refcode2=269_5257348_aANU6c&akid=269%2E5257348%2EaANU6c ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for all you do. Together, I *know* we can win this.

Let’s gooooo. 🔥

John

John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: CNN’s #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hi there, Derek!
#
So, uh, what’s the deal with this big Senate race in Pennsylvania anyways??
If you’re ready for a refresher, don’t worry, we got yinz covered. But if you already know how high the stakes are in this race...**[we’d be grateful if you could go ahead + chip in a few bucks right now to fuel our people-powered campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220522-2?refcode=em20220522-5936&refcode2=5936_434096_pyoI1r&akid=5936%2E434096%2EpyoI1r)**
Ok, let’s get after it.
For starters, CNN ranks PA as the **#1 Most Likely to Flip Senate seat.**
The bottom line is, Pennsylvania is our single biggest chance to add a new Democratic Senate seat, and the Republicans know it. **Our race could decide Senate control.**
So it’s no exaggeration to say that this is the biggest Senate race in the country, Derek.
And look, we *know* winning won’t be easy. Republicans are going to spend a LOT of money against us -- as in they’ve already dumped $55 million dollars into Pennsylvania, and they’re just getting started.
**But here’s the *very* good news:** You can count on us, Derek. We’re working day + night to flip this seat. And with enough grassroots power, we can get it done.
[**So we’ve gotta ask: Can you rush a donation today so we can go up against the Republicans + flip this seat blue in November? We know this team can win, and we’d be grateful for your support, no matter the amount.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220522-2?refcode=em20220522-5936&refcode2=5936_434096_pyoI1r&akid=5936%2E434096%2EpyoI1r)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220522-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220522-5936&refcode2=5936_434096_pyoI1r&akid=5936%2E434096%2EpyoI1r)**
If you chip in to this email, THANK YOU!! If you opt out today, that’s *totally* OK. Either way, we’re so honored + happy to be on a team with you, Derek.
Together,
John + Gisele

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220522-5936-footer&t=1&refcode2=5936_434096_pyoI1r&akid=5936%2E434096%2EpyoI1r)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=5936%2E434096%2EpyoI1r)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=5936%2E434096%2EpyoI1r)

But here’s the very good news: You can count on us, Derek. We’re working day + night to flip this seat. And with enough grassroots power, we can get it done. If you chip in to this email, THANK YOU!! If you opt out today, that’s totally OK. Either way, we’re so honored + happy to be on a team with you, Derek. Together, John + Gisele | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kallie=20Munson?=
subject: A Letter from Kallie Munson to You and Your Family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
body:
There are only two days left to vote in the May 24th Republican Primary. It has been wonderful talking with and meeting so many of you as Jeremy... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremymunson/breaking-i-am-running-for-congress-in-minnesotas-1st-district-9019065?e=f4c2e54596)
---
|
---
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=c5911d69de&e=f4c2e54596)
Dear Friends:There are only two days left to vote in the May 24th Republican Primary. It has been wonderful talking with and meeting so many of you as Jeremy campaigned all across the First District. I greatly appreciate all your support and prayers.For those who I have not yet met in person, my name is Kallie Munson. I was born and raised in the First District. In fact, my family still farms in Madelia, where I grew up. Jeremy and I have been married nearly eighteen years. Together, we have raised two fabulous girls and faced life’s joys, adventures, and challenges.Jeremy is a great father and supportive husband. When I was diagnosed with breast cancer, Jeremy was there to help me through each step in my battle. I know Jeremy to be a kind and generous person who goes out of his way to help others. While I married Jeremy because he is a wonderful person, I encouraged him to run for Congress because we need a Congressman who will bravely stand up for our Constitution and conservative values.We need a Congressman who will say, “enough is enough” to the ridiculous spending, continuous deterioration of our liberties, and never-ending growth of government and regulations. We need a Congressman who will fight for our families, farmers, and small businesses.Too often, I have watched well-meaning people talk a good talk when campaigning, only to fold when enticed, pressured, and attacked by lobbyists, liberals, and the establishment.Jeremy’s record in the Minnesota House proves he is a man of principle who cannot be bought or pushed around. As another legislator once said when speaking at a local Republican party picnic, “Jeremy has a spine of steel.”Over the past few years, I have grown to appreciate how important and rare this quality is in our political leaders. I have come to realize very few politicians are actually willing to fight for what is right. This is why our government has grown out of control!If we want to decrease inflation, our national debt, and the size of the government, Congress must stop spending! Yet, Jeremy is the only candidate willing to state he will not vote to raise the debt ceiling.While serving as a state representative, my husband repeatedly proved he is a true fiscal conservative who supports less government interference in our lives and fights to defend our constitution. He fought against both Republican and Democrat proposed budget increases and believes we should require a balanced budget where all agencies must justify their spending.He demonstrated his willingness to stand up to lobbyists and his ability to successfully champion important pieces of legislation reforming lobbying laws, exposing kickbacks to big pharma, and increasing medical price transparency.Jeremy and I firmly believe our Constitution is not simply meant to be followed when convenient. From the moment Jeremy was elected and all throughout the pandemic, Jeremy fought to follow the Constitution and defend our liberties. Even when the liberal press attacked him, Jeremy did not back down from filing a lawsuit against the governor to fight for the separation of power and against the unconstitutional mandates.When the democrats singled him out and attacked him for publicly speaking about election integrity, vaccine mandates, riots, and CRT, Jeremy fired back by speaking out more, writing articles, introducing legislation, and even suing the Secretary of State for misusing the judicial system to bypass the legislature and change election law. (Minnesotans eventually won this case.)Unlike many politicians and candidates, Jeremy does not simply tell people what he thinks they want to hear. He is willing to have difficult conversations. His ability to make new arguments, devotion to government transparency, and focus on Constitutional rights, liberties, and freedoms help him engage new and younger voters to support less government. It is why both the college Republicans and college Democrats invited him to speak. It also helps him appeal to independents and grow the Republican base, which will keep this seat in Republican hands and help other Republicans win statewide elections.My husband is consistent in how he votes. For instance, he voted against unconstitutional multi-subject omnibus bills, no matter if Republicans or Democrats brought them forward. He does not simply vote as he is told and will not vote for a bill he is not allowed to read. In fact, the very bill he is criticized for voting against in the attack ads, was created by leadership and lobbyists behind closed doors, never heard in committee and never allowed public input then given to all other legislators only six minutes before the vote. As you might guess, this bill was rotten to the core.Overall, Jeremy wants to see strong voices in Congress stand up for limited government, reduced spending, energy independence, Life, and our Constitutional rights and liberties.Jeremy’s devotion to these ideals is the reason he is**endorsed by Sen. Rand Paul, Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Jim Jordan, Rep. Thomas Massie, and many other strong conservatives.** If you want a Congressman you can trust to cast every vote with your family’s best interest in mind, then I hope you’ll join me in voting to elect my husband, Jeremy Munson.We will win this if each of us remembers to go vote Munson and all call five or ten friends or family members and ask them to vote for Munson.God Bless,
Kallie Munson
|
---
| [Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
---

funding in the door before Tuesday, we have a very good chance to win this
race.

Team JD

name: Herschel Walker
subject: The racist hits just keep coming
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
He doesn’t understand how I can be a Black conservative. |
---
Fellow American - It's happening again.

The same liberal commentator who has been attacking me and our campaign for the last month keeps getting invited to appear on new platforms to spew his racist attacks. His newest attack came on a YouTube show.

FIRST: He penned an article for The Nation calling my candidacy _**"white insult to Black people." **_

THEN: He doubled down in his attacks on me AND Senator Tim Scott for being Black conservatives: _**"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." **_

NOW: He's continuing his racist attacks on a YouTube interview, calling me _**"a token for white people." **_

Take a look at the clip:

clean_body: He doesn’t understand how I can be a Black conservative. | Fellow American - It's happening again. The same liberal commentator who has been attacking me and our campaign for the last month keeps getting invited to appear on new platforms to spew his racist attacks. His newest attack came on a YouTube show. FIRST: He penned an article for The Nation calling my candidacy "white insult to Black people." THEN: He doubled down in his attacks on me AND Senator Tim Scott for being Black conservatives: "I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." NOW: He's continuing his racist attacks on a YouTube interview, calling me "a token for white people." Take a look at the clip: I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character, the way I communicate, and my skin color have gone too far. I invited my critic to dinner so we could come together and find common ground, but he belittled my invitation. He doesn't understand how I can be a Black conservative. I won't be quiet about this. People who say horrible things about their fellow human beings based on the color of their skin are simply wrong. Fellow American, please stand with me today. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

clean_body: I know you’ll understand | Friend, I didn’t want it to come down to this, but desperate times call for desperate measures. I hate asking for your support again, because you’ve already done so much to help me and my campaign combat Nancy Pelosi and California Socialists, but we’ve got more work to do and we NEED YOUR HELP. That’s why I’m relieved to tell you that a patriotic supporter offered to help us hit our May fundraising goal. They are offering a 500% match for ALL donations made in the next 24 hours! In my times of need, you have stepped up and encouraged me fiercely and loyally. | You have NEVER let me down before, and I know you will not let me down now. When Democrats is doing everything she can to take this district, take this election away from us. I hate to have to ask for your support again so soon, right after you did everything you could to help me last year, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask. This is going to be a FIGHT and it’s only getting tougher from here on out. That’s why I’m so glad I have you by my side. I am humbly asking you to give anything you can, so we can make the most of this incredible matching opportunity in the next 24 hours. The only way we’re going to save America is by pushing through these tough times, knowing that victory will mean EVERYTHING AND MORE IN NOVEMBER! Please don’t wait until it’s too late. God Bless you, Vernon Jones Representative Jones is an America- First candidate and one of the most visible and impassioned supporters of President Trump. Vernon Jones is the only Trump-endorsed candidate in his race. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Vernon for Congress Copyright © 2022 Vernon Jones for Congress, All rights reserved.

subject: It’s Time for Change in D.C. -- Brice Wiggins for Congress Update

body:
It’s Time For a Republican With A Record of Accomplishment to Replace Palazzo | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bricewiggins/campaign-updates-8989501?e=698f056321)
---
[](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2495b151b0&e=698f056321)
_**Yard signs are available for pick up M-F 8:30 am - 5 pm at The Focus Group office in Downtown Biloxi - 727 Howard Ave (4th floor). If you'd like one delivered, please email**[**info@bricewiggins.ms**](mailto:info@bricewiggins.ms)**and our team will happily assist.**_
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=e8cc89d40a&e=698f056321)
---
| **Watch My Interview on WLOX News This Week** Watch my interview that aired this morning with Dave Elliott on WLOx News This Week at the link [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=30311afe04&e=698f056321).
---
|
---
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ddde9dc79e&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
_**“Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful, committed citizens can change the world: indeed, it’s the only thing that ever has.”**_ _**–Margaret Mead**_
|
---
# Campaign Trail Highlights
| | | | | |
# Door-to-Door This Week
[**WATCH HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=22d55b5abd&e=698f056321) for video highlights of this week’s visits to Sumrall, Picayune, D’Iberville and more! (Loved the two dogs who wanted a push card!)
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=fa383462c6&e=698f056321)
---
**Buddy’s Law is Official! - Gov. Reeves Signs the Animal Cruelty Bill I Authored**

Buddy's Law was signed by the Governor this week. I had the honor of being the lead sponsor of this critical legislation to protect our four-legged friends. Special thanks to my co-sponsor Angela Burks Hill of Picayune and the many other animal lovers who helped push this legislation through. I look forward to championing and fighting for causes like Buddy’s in Congress.
| | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | **Visited a South Mississippi Gun Show** The 2nd Amendment is sacrosanct, enshrined by our forefathers in the Bill of Rights. It cannot, and will not, be taken away. I proudly spent the morning w/ men and women from all backgrounds enjoying that right. I saw Mr. Pratt, a family friend at the show who spent over a decade in the Marines. Thank you sir, well-done.To watch my policy video on the 2nd Amendment [**CLICK HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=3fdaad9eb4&e=698f056321)
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=42f9640019&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | |
---
| **It Was Popsicle Time at Third Friday in Pascagoula!** Jesus said, “Let the little children come to me, and do not hinder them, for the kingdom of heaven belongs to such as these. --Mathew 19:14Popsicles FTW! It was a wonderful Third Friday last night. Keep it up Main Street Pascagoula. We love supporting our local communities!

---
| | | | | | **Blessing of the Fleet in Pass Christian** I had the privilege of celebrating the kickoff of the shrimp season at Pass Christian’s Blessing of the Fleet on Saturday.**** The shrimp industry is full of hardworking Mississippians and families who have carried these traditions on since the 1800’s. Just like all South Mississippi industries, I plan to work hard for their interests in D.C.
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7199ceaf73&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=fbdf4e84b9&e=698f056321)
---
| **Pascagoula City Council Acknowledgement** My goal growing up was to work hard so I could give back to my hometown and the community that shaped me, and I am humbled to have been able to do so throughout my career. Thank you, Mayor Willis, and the Council for allowing me to provide a legislative update and for the recognition of my public service. Pascagoula will always hold a special place in my heart - it's truly my honor to serve you all. #PascagoulaProud
---
|
---
| | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=79576b42f4&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=999faf2330&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=0c4f09f399&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7860909d4f&e=698f056321)| [](mailto:info@bricewiggins.ms)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=0897b36e03&e=698f056321)
---|---|---|---|---|---
|
---
# Final Note...
As a leader, serving others and taking action to create real change that positively impacts the people I’m elected to represent is my mission. Mississippi, I’m ready to work for you and with you to build a nation we can once again be proud of.I hope you will consider my passion and strong record of getting things done as I ask for your vote and support on June 7.
Sincerely,
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=96e45620fc&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
# Primary Election Voting Information
### The Primary Election is on June 7.
Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ad8e3feca0&e=698f056321) for the Secretary of State Voter Information Guide for Details.
### Are you registered to vote? Find out [HERE](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f559b2f644&e=698f056321).
### Out of town on June 7th?
IN-PERSON ABSENTEE VOTING - Visit your [**County Circuit Clerk’s Office**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=a4ba9d1bd7&e=698f056321) to absentee vote in person from April 23 to June 4.MAIL-IN ABSENTEE VOTING - Contact the Circuit Clerk’s Office located in the county of your residence and request an Official Application for Absentee Elector’s Ballot be mailed to you. The Application and Ballot may be mailed together depending on how close to the election date is when the ballot is requested.*Mail-in absentee ballots must be postmarked on or before Election Day and received on or within five (5) business days of the election, June 14th, for them to count.
### [Click HERE for a step-by-step guide for Absentee Voting.](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=e46847fc42&e=698f056321)
|
---
Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6e72bac1ae&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|
---
